ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Dice: typing '1d6', '2d8+3', etc. become clickable roll buttons when the card is inserted.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Keywords: typing 'hope', 'fear', 'hp', 'stress' (any casing) are auto-colored when keyword highlighting is enabled in Settings.
ast.target: 关键词：输入 'hope'、'fear'、'hp'、'stress'（任何大小写），当在设置中启用关键词高亮显示时，会自动着色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with digging claws and acidic blood.
ast.target: 一种体型如马、拥有挖掘爪和酸性血液的昆虫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Burrower can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 掘地虫在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射三次。照常花费恐惧值来照射它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Burrower burst out of the ground. All creatures within Very Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or be knocked over, making them Vulnerable until they next act.
ast.target: 使掘地虫从地下破土而出。所有极近距离范围内的生物必须成功通过敏捷反应检定，否则将被击倒，直到下次行动前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Burrower takes Severe damage, all creatures within Close range are bathed in their acidic blood, taking 1d10 physical damage. This splash covers the ground within Very Close range with blood, and all creatures other than the Burrower who move through it take 1d6 physical damage.
ast.target: 当掘地虫受到严重伤害时，近距离范围内的所有生物都会被其酸性血液溅射，受到1d10点物理伤害。此溅射会将极近距离范围内的地面覆盖血液，除掘地虫外，任何穿过该区域的生物都会受到1d6点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large bear with thick fur and powerful claws.
ast.target: 一种皮毛厚实、爪子强壮的大型熊。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Bear’s standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 被熊的标准攻击标记生命值的目标会被击退至极近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 physical damage and the target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，造成3d4+10点物理伤害，目标被束缚，直到通过一次成功的体质检定挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bear makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熊对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive humanoid who sees all sapient life as food.
ast.target: 一个将所有智慧生命视为食物的巨型人形生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Ogre. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须花费1点恐惧值来照射食人魔。在被照射期间，它可以对范围内的所有目标发动标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ogre’s attacks deal direct damage.
ast.target: 食人魔的攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to pick up heavy objects and throw them at all targets in front of the Ogre within Far range. Make an attack against these targets. Targets the Ogre succeeds against take 1d10+2 physical damage. If they succeed against more than one target, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 拾起重物并将其投掷向食人魔前方远距离范围内的所有目标。对这些目标发动攻击。食人魔成功命中的目标受到1d10+2点物理伤害。如果它成功命中多个目标，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ogre marks 2 or more HP, they can rampage. Move the Ogre to a point within Close range and deal 2d6+3 direct physical damage to all targets in their path.
ast.target: 当食人魔标记2点或更多生命值时，它可以进行暴走。将食人魔移动至近距离范围内的一个点，并对其路径上的所有目标造成2d6+3点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A roughly humanoid being of stone and steel, assembled and animated by magic.
ast.target: 一个由石头和钢铁构成的粗略人形生物，由魔法组装并赋予生命。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Construct can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 构装体在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照射两次。照常花费恐惧值来照射它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Construct marks HP from physical damage, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当构装体因物理伤害标记生命值时，它必须额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets in the Construct’s path when they move. Targets the Construct succeeds against take 1d8 physical damage.
ast.target: 当构装体移动时，对其路径上的所有目标发动攻击。构装体成功命中的目标受到1d8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Construct’s attack, you can mark a Stress to gain a +10 bonus to the damage roll. The Construct can then take the spotlight again.
ast.target: 在为构装体的攻击掷伤害骰之前，你可以标记1点压力值，为伤害骰获得+10加值。然后构装体可以再次获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Construct marks their last HP, the magic powering them ruptures in an explosion of force. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Construct succeeds against take 1d12+2 magic damage.
ast.target: 当构装体标记其最后一点生命值时，驱动它的魔法在一次力量爆发中破裂。对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动一次具有优势的攻击。构装体成功命中的目标受到1d12+2点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambitious and ostentatiously dressed socialite.
ast.target: 一个野心勃勃、衣着浮夸的社交名流。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to say something mocking and force a target within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (14) to see if they can save face. On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is Vulnerable until the scene ends.
ast.target: 说一些嘲讽的话，并迫使近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次存在感反应检定（14），以判断他们是否能保住面子。失败时，目标必须标记2点压力值，并在场景结束前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a PC. The Courtier convinces a crowd or prominent individual that the target is the cause of their current conflict or misfortune.
ast.target: 并以一名玩家角色为目标。廷臣说服一群人或一位显要人物，认为该目标是他们当前冲突或不幸的根源。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A burly vegetable-person with grasping vines.
ast.target: 一个拥有缠绕藤蔓的强壮蔬菜人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Slam the ground, knocking all targets within Very Close range back to Far range. Each target knocked back this way must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 猛击地面，将极近距离范围内的所有目标击退至远距离范围。每个被这样击退的目标必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, spend a Fear to pull them into Melee range, deal 1d6+2 physical damage, and Restrain them until the Defender takes Severe damage.
ast.target: 对近距离范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，花费1点恐惧值将其拉入近战范围，造成1d6+2点物理伤害，并将其束缚，直到防御者受到严重伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large wolf with menacing teeth, seldom encountered alone.
ast.target: 一种拥有骇人獠牙的大型狼，很少单独出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Wolf makes a successful standard attack and another Dire Wolf is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d6+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 如果狼成功发动标准攻击，并且另一只恐狼在目标的近战范围内，则造成1d6+5点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害，并且你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 direct physical damage and make them Vulnerable until they clear at least 1 HP.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，造成3d4+10点直接物理伤害，并使其在清除至少1点生命值前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Dozens of fist-sized mosquitoes, flying together for protection.
ast.target: 数十只拳头大小的蚊子，成群飞行以寻求保护。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当蚊群标记了其一半或更多的生命值时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Mosquitoes have a +2 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，蚊群的难度获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes’ attack causes a target to mark HP, you can mark a Stress to force the target to mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当蚊群的攻击导致目标标记生命值时，你可以标记1点压力值，迫使目标额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cat-sized rodent skilled at scavenging and survival.
ast.target: 一种猫大小的啮齿动物，擅长拾荒和生存。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Rat is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Rat, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 老鼠受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对老鼠造成3点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个会被命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Giant Rats within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 1 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并照射其近距离范围内的所有巨型老鼠。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战范围内，并进行一次共享的攻击检定。成功时，每只造成1点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A human-sized insect with tearing claws and a stinging tail.
ast.target: 一种人大小的昆虫，拥有撕裂的爪子和带刺的尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against two targets within Melee range.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的两个目标发动标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Scorpion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当蝎子对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clear serpent with a massive head that leaves behind a glass shard trail wherever they go.
ast.target: 一种透明的蛇，头部巨大，所到之处会留下玻璃碎片的痕迹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a successful attack within Melee range against the Snake, the attacker must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 在近战范围内对蛇发动攻击成功时，攻击者必须标记一个护甲槽，且不获得其收益（他们仍然可以使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果他们无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Snake succeeds against take 1d6+1 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动攻击。蛇成功命中的目标受到1d6+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to introduce a d6 Spitter Die. When the Snake is in the spotlight, roll this die. On a result of 5 or higher, all targets in front of the Snake within Far range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d4 physical damage. The Snake can take the spotlight a second time this GM turn.
ast.target: 引入一个d6喷射骰。当蛇被聚光灯照射时，掷此骰。结果为5或更高时，蛇前方远距离范围内的所有目标必须成功通过敏捷反应检定，否则受到1d4点物理伤害。蛇可以在本游戏主持人回合中再次获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble fighter armed with javelins.
ast.target: 一名装备标枪的敏捷战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After making a standard attack, the Harrier can move anywhere within Far range.
ast.target: 进行一次标准攻击后，鹞式战斗机可在远距离范围内任意移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature moves into Melee range to make an attack, you can mark a Stress before the attack roll to move anywhere within Close range and make an attack against that creature. On a success, deal 1d10+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物移动至近战距离进行攻击时，你可以在攻击掷骰前标记一个压力值，以在近距离范围内任意移动并对该生物进行一次攻击。若成功，造成1d10+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A tall guard bearing a longbow and quiver with arrows fletched in the settlement’s colors.
ast.target: 一名高大的守卫，手持长弓和箭袋，箭羽染有定居点的颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 1d12+3 physical damage. If the target marks HP from this attack, they have disadvantage on Agility Rolls until they clear at least 1 HP.
ast.target: 对远距离范围内的一个目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一个压力值以造成1d12+3点物理伤害。如果目标因此次攻击标记了生命值，其在清除至少1点生命值前，进行敏捷掷骰时处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armored guard bearing a sword and shield painted in the settlement’s colors.
ast.target: 一名身着盔甲的守卫，手持涂有定居点颜色的剑和盾牌。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who tries to move within Very Close range of the Guard must succeed on an Agility Roll. If additional Bladed Guards are standing in a line alongside the first, and each is within Melee range of another guard in the line, the Difficulty increases by the total number of guards in that line.
ast.target: 任何试图移动至守卫极近距离范围内的生物必须通过一次敏捷掷骰。如果额外的刀锋守卫与第一名守卫排成一线，且每名守卫都处于线上另一名守卫的近战距离内，则难度增加的数量等于该线上守卫的总数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to Restrain the target until they break free with a successful attack, Finesse Roll, or Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一个压力值以束缚该目标，直到其通过一次成功的攻击、技巧掷骰或力量掷骰挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned guard with a mace, a whistle, and a bellowing voice.
ast.target: 一名经验丰富的守卫，手持钉头锤，佩戴哨子，声音洪亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight the Head Guard and up to 2d4 allies within Far range.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧值，以聚焦头目守卫及其远距离范围内最多2d4名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Head Guard makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当头目守卫对一名玩家角色成功进行攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning criminal in a cloak bearing one of the gang’s iconic knives.
ast.target: 一名狡猾的罪犯，身披斗篷，手持帮派标志性的匕首之一。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bandit climbs just as easily as they run.
ast.target: 强盗攀爬起来如同奔跑一样轻松。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bandit succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 1d10+1 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当强盗从目标上方成功进行一次标准攻击时，他们造成1d10+1点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A staff -wielding bandit in a cloak adorned with magical paraphernalia, using curses to vex their foes.
ast.target: 一名手持法杖、身披斗篷的强盗，斗篷上饰有魔法器物，用诅咒来折磨敌人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a target within Far range and temporarily Curse them. While the target is Cursed, you can mark a Stress when that target rolls with Hope to make the roll be with Fear instead.
ast.target: 选择远距离范围内的一个目标并暂时诅咒他们。当目标处于诅咒状态时，你可以在该目标以希望掷骰时标记一个压力值，使该次掷骰改为以恐惧进行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against up to three targets within Very Close range. Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+3 magic damage to targets the Hexer succeeded against.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内最多三个目标进行一次攻击。标记一个压力值，对巫术师成功命中的目标造成2d6+3点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imposing brawler carrying a large club.
ast.target: 一名气势汹汹的斗殴者，手持一根大棒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Creatures Restrained by the Kneebreaker take double damage from attacks by other adversaries.
ast.target: 被碎膝者束缚的生物受到其他敌对生物攻击时，所受伤害翻倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes no damage but is Restrained and Vulnerable. The target can break free, clearing both conditions, with a successful Strength Roll or is freed automatically if the Kneebreaker takes Major or greater damage.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的一个目标进行一次攻击。若成功，目标不受到伤害，但被束缚且处于易伤状态。目标可以通过一次成功的力量掷骰挣脱，清除两种状态；或者如果碎膝者受到重大或更严重的伤害，目标自动获释。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A thief with simple clothes and small daggers, eager to prove themselves.
ast.target: 一名衣着朴素、手持小匕首的小偷，渴望证明自己。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Lackey is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Lackey, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当跟班受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对跟班造成3点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Jagged Knife Lackeys within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦其近距离范围内所有锯齿刀跟班。这些爪牙移动至目标的近战距离内，并进行一次共享的攻击掷骰。若成功，每个爪牙造成2点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned bandit in quality leathers with a strong voice and cunning eyes.
ast.target: 一名经验丰富的强盗，身着优质皮甲，声音洪亮，眼神狡黠。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Lieutenant, mark a Stress to also spotlight two allies within Close range.
ast.target: 当你聚焦副官时，标记一个压力值，同时聚焦其近距离范围内的两名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summon three Jagged Knife Lackeys, who appear at Far range.
ast.target: 召唤三名锯齿刀跟班，他们出现在远距离范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+12 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对近距离范围内的一个易伤目标进行一次攻击。若成功，造成2d6+12点物理伤害，且目标必须标记一个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Lieutenant makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当副官对一名玩家角色成功进行攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble scoundrel bearing a wicked knife and utilizing shadow magic to isolate targets.
ast.target: 一名身手敏捷的恶棍，手持一把邪恶的匕首，并利用暗影魔法孤立目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shadow succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 1d6+6 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当暗影在一次具有优势的标准攻击中成功时，他们造成1d6+6点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Become Hidden until after the Shadow’s next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
ast.target: 进入隐藏状态，直到暗影的下一次攻击之后。通过此特性隐藏时进行的攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lanky bandit striking from cover with a shortbow.
ast.target: 一名瘦长的强盗，从掩体后用短弓发起攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Sniper is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, they deal 1d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果狙击手在隐藏状态下对目标成功进行一次标准攻击，他们造成1d10+4点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A finely dressed trader with a keen eye for financial gain.
ast.target: 一名衣着考究的商人，对经济利益有着敏锐的眼光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll against the Merchant gains a discount on purchases. A PC who fails on a Presence Roll against the Merchant must pay more and has disadvantage on future Presence Rolls against the Merchant.
ast.target: 一名玩家角色若在对抗商人的存在感掷骰中成功，可获得购买折扣。若失败，则必须支付更多，并且在未来的对抗商人的存在感掷骰中处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a 14 or lower on a Presence Roll made against the Merchant, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在对抗商人的存在感掷骰中掷出14或更低时，他们必须标记一个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A coruscating mass of uncontrollable magic.
ast.target: 一团闪烁不定、无法控制的魔法团块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Elemental is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 该元素生物对魔法伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a HP to force all targets within Close range to mark a Stress and become Vulnerable until their next rest or they clear a HP.
ast.target: 标记1点生命值，迫使近距离范围内的所有目标标记一个压力值，并处于易伤状态，直到他们下次休息或清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to transform the area within Very Close range into a diff erent biome. All targets within this area take 2d6+3 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 将极近距离范围内的区域转变为不同的生物群系。该区域内的所有目标受到2d6+3点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Elemental takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal an amount of damage to the attacker equal to half the damage they dealt.
ast.target: 当元素生物受到近距离范围内攻击的伤害时，对攻击者造成相当于其所造成伤害一半的伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Elemental makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当元素生物对一名玩家角色成功进行攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living flame the size of a large bonfire.
ast.target: 一团大小如大型篝火的活体火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Elemental can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 该元素生物在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦两次。照常消耗恐惧值来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a point within Far range. The ground within Very Close range of that point immediately bursts into flames. All creatures within this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8 magic damage from the flames. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 选择远距离范围内的一个点。该点极近距离范围内的地面立即燃起火焰。该区域内的所有生物必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到2d8点魔法火焰伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to erupt in a fiery explosion. Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against take 1d8 magic damage and are knocked back to Far range.
ast.target: 引发一场火焰爆炸。对近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击。元素生物成功命中的目标受到1d8点魔法伤害，并被击退至远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Three times per scene, when the Elemental moves onto objects that are highly flammable, consume them to clear a HP or a Stress.
ast.target: 每场场景三次，当元素生物移动到高度易燃的物体上时，消耗它们以清除1点生命值或1个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A crimson-hued creature from the Circles Below, consumed by rage against all mortals.
ast.target: 一只来自下层领域的深红色生物，对所有凡人充满愤怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Demon can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 该恶魔在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦两次。照常消耗恐惧值来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a failure with Fear while within Close range of the Demon, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在恶魔近距离范围内掷出带有恐惧的失败时，他们失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to rain down hellfire within Far range. All targets within the area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 1d20+3 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 在远距离范围内降下地狱之火。该区域内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到1d20+3点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Demon’s attack, you can mark a Stress to gain a bonus to the damage roll equal to the Demon’s current number of marked HP.
ast.target: 在为恶魔的攻击掷伤害骰之前，你可以标记一点压力，使伤害骰获得加值，加值等于恶魔当前已标记的生命值数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Demon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当恶魔成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambulatory sapling rising up to defend their forest.
ast.target: 一株为保卫森林而起身的行走树苗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Treant is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Treant, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 树人受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对树人造成5点伤害，就在攻击范围内的额外一名小兵被击败（该攻击需能命中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Minor Treants within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦于其近距离范围内的所有小型树人。这些小兵移动至目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各造成4点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明绿色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Ooze and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚焦于软泥怪且其状态栏上没有标记时，它无法行动。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你聚焦于软泥怪且其状态栏上有标记时，清除标记，它便可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当软泥怪成功攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽，但不获得其收益（他们仍可使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记一点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the Ooze envelops them and the target must mark 2 Stress. The target must mark an additional Stress when they make an action roll. If the Ooze takes Severe damage, the target is freed.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。若成功，软泥怪包裹住目标，目标必须标记2点压力。当目标进行行动检定时，必须额外标记一点压力。如果软泥怪受到重度伤害，目标将被释放。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze has 3 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Tiny Green Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.
ast.target: 当软泥怪已标记3点或更多生命值时，你可以花费一点恐惧将其分裂为两个微型绿色软泥怪（无已标记的生命值或压力）。立即聚焦于两者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一团小型移动的半透明绿色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent flaming red slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明燃烧红色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ooze can only move within Very Close range as their normal movement. They light any flammable object they touch on fire.
ast.target: 软泥怪的正常移动只能在其极近距离范围内进行。它们会点燃任何触碰到的易燃物品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 1d8 magic damage and is Ignited until they’re extinguished with a successful Finesse Roll (14). While Ignited, the target takes 1d4 magic damage when they make an action roll.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次攻击。若成功，目标受到1d8点魔法伤害，并被点燃，直到通过一次成功的敏捷检定（14）扑灭。在被点燃期间，目标进行行动检定时会受到1d4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze has 3 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Tiny Red Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.
ast.target: 当软泥怪已标记3点或更多生命值时，你可以花费一点恐惧将其分裂为两个微型红色软泥怪（无已标记的生命值或压力）。立即聚焦于两者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent flaming red slime
ast.target: 一团小型移动的半透明燃烧红色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Melee range deals damage to the Ooze, they take 1d6 direct magic damage
ast.target: 当近战范围内的生物对软泥怪造成伤害时，该生物受到1d6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A richly dressed and adorned aristocrat brimming with hubris.
ast.target: 一位衣着华丽、装饰考究、充满傲慢的贵族。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All social actions made against the Noble on their land have disadvantage.
ast.target: 在其领地内，所有针对贵族的社交行动都处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4 Bladed Guards, who appear at Far range to enforce the Noble’s will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一点压力，召唤1d4名刃卫，他们出现在远距离范围，以执行贵族的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a PC. The Noble proclaims that the target and their allies are exiled from the noble’s territory. While exiled, the target and their allies have disadvantage during social situations within the Noble’s domain.
ast.target: 并选择一名玩家角色为目标。贵族宣布该目标及其盟友被驱逐出贵族的领地。在被驱逐期间，目标及其盟友在贵族领地内的社交场合中处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A charismatic sea dog with an impressive hat, eager to raid and plunder.
ast.target: 一位魅力十足、戴着一顶令人印象深刻帽子的海上恶棍，热衷于劫掠。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当船长因近战范围内的攻击而标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon a Pirate Raiders Horde, which appears at Far range.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一点压力，召唤一个海盗劫掠者群，他们出现在远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target who has three or more Pirates within Melee range of them. The Captain leads the Pirates in hurling threats and promises of a watery grave. The target must make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target marks 1d4+1 Stress. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，该目标近战范围内有三名或更多海盗。船长带领海盗们发出威胁和葬身海底的承诺。目标必须进行一次存在感反应检定。若失败，目标标记1d4+1点压力。若成功，他们必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当船长成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seafaring scoundrels moving in a ravaging pack.
ast.target: 成群结队、四处劫掠的海上恶棍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当劫掠者已标记一半或更多生命值时，他们的标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders mark 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当劫掠者因近战范围内的攻击而标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A thickly muscled and tattooed pirate with melon-sized fists.
ast.target: 一位肌肉发达、纹身遍布、拥有西瓜般大小拳头的海盗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Tough marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当硬汉因近战范围内的攻击而标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to move into Melee range of the target, dealing 3d4 physical damage and knocking the target back to Close range.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一点压力以移动至目标的近战范围，造成3d4点物理伤害并将目标击退至近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armed mercenary testing their luck.
ast.target: 一位碰运气的武装雇佣兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sellsword is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Sellsword, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 佣兵受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对佣兵造成4点伤害，就在攻击范围内的额外一名小兵被击败（该攻击需能命中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Sellswords within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 3 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦于其近距离范围内的所有佣兵。这些小兵移动至目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各造成3点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fragile skeleton with a shortbow and arrows.
ast.target: 一具手持短弓和箭矢的脆弱骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When two or more adversaries are within Very Close range of a creature, all damage the Archer deals to that creature is doubled.
ast.target: 当两名或更多敌人处于一个生物的极近距离范围内时，弓箭手对该生物造成的所有伤害翻倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 3d4+8 physical damage.
ast.target: 对远距离范围内的一个易受攻击目标进行一次攻击。若成功，标记一点压力，造成3d4+8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Dredge is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Dredge, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 亡灵受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对亡灵造成4点伤害，就在攻击范围内的额外一名小兵被击败（该攻击需能命中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Dredges within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 1 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦于其近距离范围内的所有亡灵。这些小兵移动至目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各造成1点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large armored skeleton with a huge blade.
ast.target: 一具手持巨刃、身披重甲的大型骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当骑士成功攻击时，近距离范围内的所有玩家角色失去一点希望，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take 1d8+2 physical damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到1d8+2点物理伤害，并必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight is defeated, they make an attack against a target within Very Close range (prioritizing the creature who killed them). On a success, the target takes 1d4+8 physical damage and loses 1d4 Hope.
ast.target: 当骑士被击败时，他们对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次攻击（优先攻击杀死他们的生物）。若成功，目标受到1d4+8点物理伤害，并失去1d4点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dirt-covered skeleton armed with a rusted blade.
ast.target: 一具手持生锈刀刃、满身泥土的骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Warrior is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 战士对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Warrior is defeated, you can spotlight them and roll a d 6. On a result of 6, if there are other adversaries on the battlefield, the Warrior re-forms with no marked HP.
ast.target: 当战士被击败时，你可以聚焦于他们并掷一个d6。若结果为6，且战场上还有其他敌人，战士将重新成形，且无已标记的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A mercenary combining swordplay and magic to deadly eff ect.
ast.target: 一位将剑术与魔法结合以产生致命效果的雇佣兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Damage dealt by the Spellblade’s standard attack is considered both physical and magic.
ast.target: 魔剑士标准攻击造成的伤害同时被视为物理和魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and target a group within Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d8+2 magic damage. You gain a Fear for each target who marked HP from this attack.
ast.target: 并瞄准远距范围内的一组目标。所有目标必须通过敏捷反应检定，否则受到1d8+2点魔法伤害。每有一个目标因此攻击标记生命值，你便获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight up to five allies within Far range.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，聚光灯最多五名远距范围内的盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Spellblade makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当魔剑士对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skittering mass of ordinary rodents moving as one like a ravenous wave.
ast.target: 一群普通啮齿动物如饥渴的浪潮般聚合移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当虫群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All targets within Melee range have disadvantage on attacks against targets other than the Swarm.
ast.target: 近战范围内的所有目标对虫群以外目标的攻击处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A faerie warrior adorned in armor made of leaves and bark.
ast.target: 一位身着树叶与树皮制成盔甲的仙灵战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Soldier makes a standard attack and another Sylvan Soldier is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d8+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当士兵发动标准攻击且另一名森林士兵在目标近战范围内时，改为造成1d8+5点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to pull down a tree within Close range. A creature hit by the tree must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (15) or take 1d10 physical damage.
ast.target: 拉倒近距范围内的一棵树。被树击中的生物必须通过敏捷反应检定（15），否则受到1d10点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Soldier makes a successful attack, you can mark a Stress to become Hidden until the Soldier’s next attack or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll (14) to find them.
ast.target: 当士兵成功发动攻击时，你可以标记1点压力，使其保持隐藏状态，直到士兵的下一次攻击或一名玩家角色通过本能检定（14）找到他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cluster of animate, blood-drinking tumbleweeds, each the size of a large gourd.
ast.target: 一群会动的、吸血的风滚草，每株都有大葫芦那么大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当虫群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to deal 2d6+8 direct physical damage to a target with 3 or more bramble tokens.
ast.target: 对拥有3个或更多荆棘标记的目标造成2d6+8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一株会动的、吸血的风滚草。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bramble is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Tangle Bramble, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 荆棘受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对缠结荆棘造成4点伤害，便额外击败攻击范围内一名会被攻击命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Tangle Brambles within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，聚光灯其近距范围内所有缠结荆棘。这些爪牙移动至目标近战范围并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每株造成2点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an attack from the Bramble causes a target to mark HP and there are three or more Tangle Bramble Minions within Close range, you can combine the Minions into a Tangle Bramble Swarm Horde. The Horde’s HP is equal to the number of Minions combined.
ast.target: 当荆棘的攻击导致目标标记生命值，且近距范围内有三株或更多缠结荆棘爪牙时，你可以将这些爪牙合并为一个缠结荆棘虫群集群。集群的生命值等于被合并的爪牙数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A master-at-arms wielding a sword twice their size.
ast.target: 一位挥舞着比自己还大两倍的剑的武器大师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, mark a Stress to Taunt the target until their next successful attack. The next time the Taunted target attacks, they have disadvantage against targets other than the Weaponmaster.
ast.target: 对目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以嘲讽目标，直到其下一次成功攻击。被嘲讽的目标下次攻击时，对武器大师以外的目标处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress.
ast.target: 每场景一次，消耗1点恐惧以清除2点生命值和2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Weaponmaster makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当武器大师对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imperious tree-person leading their forest’s defenses.
ast.target: 一位威严的树人，领导着森林的防御。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies within range of a target they can attack without moving. On a success, their attacks deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚光灯1d4名在目标攻击范围内且无需移动即可攻击的盟友。成功时，他们的攻击造成半伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to form a cage around a target within Very Close range and Restrain them until they’re freed with a successful Strength Roll. When a creature makes an action roll against the cage, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 在极近距范围内围绕目标形成一个牢笼，并将其束缚，直到他们通过力量检定成功挣脱。当生物对牢笼进行动作检定时，必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dryad makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当树精对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large corpse, decay-bloated and angry.
ast.target: 一具肿胀腐烂、充满愤怒的巨大尸体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Zombie and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Zombie and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚光灯僵尸且其状态栏上没有标记时，他们还不能行动。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述他们正在准备做什么。当你聚光灯僵尸且其状态栏上有标记时，清除标记，他们可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack with advantage against a target the Zombie has Restrained. On a success, the attack deals direct damage.
ast.target: 对僵尸已束缚的目标进行一次带优势的标准攻击。成功时，该攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to temporarily Restrain the target and force them to mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 当僵尸成功进行标准攻击时，你可以标记1点压力以暂时束缚目标，并迫使其标记2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering gestalt of corpses moving as one, with torso-sized limbs and fists as large as a grown halfling.
ast.target: 一个由尸体聚合而成的高耸集合体，拥有躯干大小的四肢和成年半身人大小的拳头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie takes Major or greater damage, they mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当僵尸受到重大或更严重伤害时，额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a standard attack, they can attack all targets within Very Close range.
ast.target: 当僵尸进行标准攻击时，可以攻击极近距范围内的所有目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie is within Very Close range of a corpse, they can incorporate it into themselves, clearing a HP and a Stress.
ast.target: 当僵尸在极近距范围内有一具尸体时，可以将其融入自身，清除1点生命值和1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to cause all PCs within Far range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (13). Targets who fail lose a Hope and you gain a Fear for each. Targets who succeed must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使远距范围内的所有玩家角色进行一次存在感反应检定（13）。失败的目标失去1点希望，你为每个失败者获得1点恐惧。成功的目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying corpse ambling toward their prey.
ast.target: 一具腐烂的尸体，蹒跚地走向猎物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Zombie is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Zombie, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 僵尸受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对僵尸造成3点伤害，便额外击败攻击范围内一名会被攻击命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Rotted Zombies within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，聚光灯其近距范围内所有腐烂僵尸。这些爪牙移动至目标近战范围并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每具造成2点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An animated corpse that moves shakily, driven only by hunger.
ast.target: 一具仅凭饥饿驱动、摇摇晃晃移动的活尸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Zombie is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
ast.target: 当僵尸在生物近战范围内，且至少另一名僵尸在近距范围内时，对该生物的所有攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Zombie’s attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因僵尸攻击而标记生命值的目标还必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of shambling corpses instinctively moving together.
ast.target: 一群本能地聚在一起蹒跚而行的尸体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当僵尸群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies mark HP from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当僵尸群因近战范围内的攻击而标记生命值时，你可以标记1点压力以对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of trained archers bearing massive bows.
ast.target: 一群携带巨弓的训练有素的弓箭手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Squadron has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当中队已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d6+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Targets the Squadron succeeds against take 1d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 瞄准远距范围内的一点。对该点近距范围内的所有目标进行一次带优势的攻击。中队命中的目标受到1d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half damage.
ast.target: 瞄准远距范围内的一点。直到下一次带恐惧的检定前，移动至该点近距范围内的生物必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败时，受到2d6+3点物理伤害。成功时，受到半伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A young trainee eager to prove themselves.
ast.target: 一位渴望证明自己的年轻学徒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Assassin, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 刺客受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对刺客造成6点伤害，便额外击败攻击范围内一名会被攻击命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Apprentice Assassins within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，聚光灯其近距范围内所有学徒刺客。这些爪牙移动至目标近战范围并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每名造成4点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning scoundrel skilled in both poisons and ambushing.
ast.target: 一个精通毒药与伏击的狡猾恶棍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Assassin’s attacks are Vulnerable until they clear a HP.
ast.target: 被刺客攻击标记生命值的目标，在清除一个生命值前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin has advantage on attacks if they are Hidden.
ast.target: 刺客在隐匿状态下进行攻击时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Drop a smoke bomb that fills the air within Close range with smoke, Dizzying all targets in this area. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.
ast.target: 投掷一枚烟雾弹，使近距离范围内的空气充满烟雾，使该区域内所有目标陷入眩晕。眩晕目标在其下一次行动掷骰中具有劣势，随后清除该状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned killer with a threatening voice and a deadly blade.
ast.target: 一位经验丰富的杀手，拥有威胁性的嗓音和致命的刀刃。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin deals direct damage while they’re Hidden.
ast.target: 刺客在隐匿状态下造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight a number of other Assassins equal to the Assassin’s unmarked Stress.
ast.target: 以聚光灯照亮数量等于刺客未标记压力值的其他刺客。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin successfully makes a standard attack against a Vulnerable target, you can spend a Fear to deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当刺客成功对一个易伤目标进行标准攻击时，你可以花费一点恐惧值，改为造成严重伤害而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当刺客成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cube-shaped construct with a diff erent rune on each of their six sides.
ast.target: 一个立方体构造物，其六个面各有一个不同的符文。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Box can be spotlighted up to two times times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 该魔盒在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚光灯照亮两次。照常花费恐惧值来照亮它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Box’s attack, you can mark a Stress to add a d6 to the damage roll. Additionally, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 在为魔盒的攻击掷伤害骰之前，你可以标记一点压力值，为伤害骰增加一个d6。此外，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Box marks their last HP, the magic powering them ruptures in an explosion of force. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or take 2d8+1 magic damage.
ast.target: 当魔盒标记其最后一个生命值时，驱动它的魔法会在一股力量爆炸中破裂。近距离范围内的所有目标必须成功通过一次本能反应掷骰，否则受到2d8+1点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A floating humanoid skull animated by scintillating magic.
ast.target: 一个由闪烁魔法驱动的漂浮人形头骨。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can’t be Restrained.
ast.target: 该骷髅悬浮在离地数英尺的空中，无法被束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 该骷髅对魔法伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 2d6+4 magic damage.
ast.target: 对近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击。骷髅成功命中的目标受到2d6+4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. Additionally, on a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.
ast.target: 对一名在极近距离范围内拥有施法特质的玩家角色进行一次攻击。成功时，目标标记1d4点压力值，骷髅清除等量的压力值。此外，成功时，骷髅可以立即再次被聚光灯照亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A poorly trained civilian pressed into war.
ast.target: 一个训练不足、被强征入伍的平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Conscript is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Conscript, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 该征召兵受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对征召兵造成6点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Conscripts within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 6 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚光灯照亮其近距离范围内的所有征召兵。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击掷骰。成功时，它们各造成6点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished manipulator and master of the social arts.
ast.target: 一位造诣深厚的操纵者与社交艺术大师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An experienced mage wielding shadow and fear.
ast.target: 一位运用阴影与恐惧的经验丰富的法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against a target within range. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对射程内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，目标必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to wrap an ally within Close range in a shroud of Protection until the Adept marks their last HP. While Protected, the target has resistance to all damage.
ast.target: 用一层防护裹住近距离范围内的一名盟友，直到该精通者标记其最后一个生命值。在受保护期间，目标对所有伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose a point within Far range. All targets within Close range of that point are Restrained in smoky chains until they break free with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll. A target Restrained by this feature must spend a Hope to make an action roll.
ast.target: 并选择远距离范围内的一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标被烟雾锁链束缚，直到他们通过一次成功的力量或本能掷骰挣脱。被此特性束缚的目标必须花费一点希望值才能进行行动掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, when a PC rolls a failure with Fear, clear a Stress.
ast.target: 每场景两次，当一名玩家角色在带有恐惧值的情况下掷出失败时，清除一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一名转为邪教徒的职业杀手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Fang can climb and walk on vertical surfaces. Mark a Stress to move from one shadow to another within Far range.
ast.target: 该獠牙可以在垂直表面攀爬和行走。标记一点压力值，从一个阴影移动到远距离范围内的另一个阴影。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to cause a target within Melee range to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is teleported with the Fang to a shadow within Far range, making them temporarily Vulnerable. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使近战范围内的一个目标进行一次本能反应掷骰。失败时，目标必须标记2点压力值，并与獠牙一起被传送到远距离范围内的一个阴影中，使其暂时处于易伤状态。成功时，目标必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A low-ranking cultist in simple robes, eager to gain power.
ast.target: 一名身着朴素长袍、渴望获得力量的低阶邪教徒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Initiate is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Initiate, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 该入门者受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对入门者造成6点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Cult Initiates within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚光灯照亮其近距离范围内的所有邪教入门者。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击掷骰。成功时，它们各造成5点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Unnatural hounds lit from within by hellfire.
ast.target: 被地狱之火从内部点燃的非自然猎犬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当该兽群已标记其一半或更多的生命值时，其标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 使极近距离范围内的所有目标失去一点希望值。如果目标无法失去希望值，则必须改为标记2点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当该兽群成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swarm of eels that encircle and electrocute.
ast.target: 一群环绕并电击目标的电鳗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Eels have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当该鳗群已标记其一半或更多的生命值时，其标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. You gain a Fear for each target that marks HP.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。每个标记生命值的目标使你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armored squire or experienced commoner looking to advance.
ast.target: 一名身着盔甲的侍从或寻求晋升的经验丰富的平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move into Melee range of an ally and make a standard attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and the ally can clear a Stress.
ast.target: 移动到一名盟友的近战范围，并对极近距离范围内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，造成2d10+2点物理伤害，且该盟友可以清除一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Soldier is within Very Close range of a knight or other noble who would take damage, you can mark a Stress to move into Melee range of them and take the damage instead.
ast.target: 当该士兵处于一名骑士或其他贵族的极近距离范围内，且该贵族将受到伤害时，你可以标记一点压力值，移动到其近战范围并代替其承受伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A magical necromantic experiment gone wrong, leaving them warped and ungainly.
ast.target: 一次失败的魔法死灵实验，使其变得扭曲而笨拙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Experiment is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 该实验体对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target the Experiment attacks has other adversaries within Very Close range, the Experiment deals double damage.
ast.target: 当该实验体攻击的目标在极近距离范围内有其他敌手时，实验体造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight the Experiment as an additional GM move instead of spending Fear.
ast.target: 将该实验体作为额外的游戏主持人行动进行聚光灯照亮，而非花费恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A leather-clad warrior bearing a whip and massive bow.
ast.target: 一名身着皮甲、手持鞭子和巨弓的战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Beastmaster is spotlighted, you can also spotlight a Tier 1 animal adversary currently under their control.
ast.target: 当该兽王被聚光灯照亮时，你也可以聚光灯照亮一个当前受其控制的1级动物敌手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, you can mark a Stress to pin them to a nearby surface. The pinned target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，你可以标记一点压力值，将其钉在附近的表面上。被钉住的目标处于束缚状态，直到其通过一次成功的灵巧或力量掷骰挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, summon a Bear, Dire Wolf, or similar Tier 1 animal adversary under the Beastmaster’s control. The adversary appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 每场景两次，召唤一头熊、恐狼或类似的1级动物对手，由兽王控制。该对手出现在近距离，并立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An especially muscular giant wielding a warhammer larger than a human.
ast.target: 一个异常强壮的巨人，挥舞着比人类还大的战锤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Brawler charge at an inanimate object within Close range they could feasibly smash (such as a wall, cart, or market stand) and destroy it. All targets within Very Close range of the object must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 2d4+3 physical damage from the shrapnel.
ast.target: 让斗士冲向近距离内他们能够砸毁的无生命物体（如墙壁、推车或市场摊位）并将其摧毁。物体极近距离内的所有目标必须通过敏捷反应检定，否则将受到2d4+3点物理伤害（来自碎片）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Brawler deals 2d6+15 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当斗士在极近距离内因一次攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。成功时，斗士造成2d6+15点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当斗士对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant fighter wearing borrowed armor.
ast.target: 一个穿着借来盔甲的巨人战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Recruit is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Recruit, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 新兵受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对新兵造成7点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个会被命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Giant Recruits within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦其近距离内的所有巨人新兵。这些爪牙移动到目标的近战距离内，并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，它们各造成5点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant bird of prey with blood-stained talons.
ast.target: 一只爪子沾满鲜血的巨型猛禽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，鹰的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to attack a target within Far range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and knock the target over, making them Vulnerable until they next act.
ast.target: 攻击一个远距离内的目标。成功时，造成2d10+2点物理伤害，并将目标击倒，使其在下次行动前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle can drop a Restrained target they are holding. When dropped, the target is no longer Restrained but starts falling. If their fall isn’t prevented during the PCs’ next action, the target takes 2d20 physical damage when they land.
ast.target: 飞行时，鹰可以丢弃它抓着的一个被束缚的目标。被丢弃时，目标不再被束缚，但开始下落。如果玩家角色的下一次行动未能阻止其下落，目标落地时将受到2d20点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A snake-headed, scaled humanoid with a gilded bow, enraged that their peace has been disturbed.
ast.target: 一个蛇头、有鳞的人形生物，手持镀金弓，因平静被打扰而愤怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Gorgon can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 蛇发女妖每回合可被聚焦最多两次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦她。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful standard attack, the target Glows until the end of the scene and can’t become Hidden. Attack rolls made against a Glowing target have advantage.
ast.target: 当蛇发女妖成功进行一次标准攻击时，目标发光直到场景结束，且无法隐藏。对发光目标进行的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack roll against a target within Melee range using the Gorgon’s protective snakes. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 2d10+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使用蛇发女妖的护体蛇对近战距离内的目标进行一次攻击检定。成功时，标记1点压力，造成2d10+4点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当蛇发女妖对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with iridescent scales and crystalline wings moving faster than the eye can see.
ast.target: 一匹马大小的昆虫，拥有虹彩鳞片和水晶翅膀，移动速度肉眼难辨。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Flickerfly can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 闪烁飞虫每回合可被聚焦最多三次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before the Flickerfly makes an attack, roll a d 6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target’s Evasion is halved against this attack.
ast.target: 在闪烁飞虫发动攻击前，掷一个d6。结果为4或更高时，目标的闪避值在此攻击中减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who failed, you gain a Fear and the Flickerfly learns one of the target’s fears.
ast.target: 制造一个魔法炫目的景象，攫取附近敌人心智。近距离内所有目标必须进行一次本能反应检定。每个失败的目标，你获得1点恐惧，且闪烁飞虫得知该目标的一项恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decorated soldier with heavy armor and a powerful steed.
ast.target: 一名身着重甲、骑着强大坐骑的精锐士兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Knight is on a mount, they gain a +2 bonus to their Difficulty. When they take Severe damage, they’re knocked from their mount and lose this benefit until they’re next spotlighted.
ast.target: 骑士骑乘时，其难度获得+2加值。当其受到严重伤害时，会被击落坐骑，并失去此加值，直到下次被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.
ast.target: 当骑士受到物理伤害时，减少3点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Knight is mounted, move up to Far range and make a standard attack against a target. On a success, deal 2d8+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果骑士骑乘，移动至远距离并对一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，造成2d8+4点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚焦1d4+1个盟友。以这种方式被聚焦时，他们发动的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning thief with acrobatic skill and a flair for the dramatic.
ast.target: 一个狡猾的盗贼，身手矫健，富有戏剧性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 1d8+2 physical damage and the Thief steals one item or consumable from the target’s inventory.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的目标发动一次攻击。成功时，造成1d8+2点物理伤害，且盗贼从目标的物品栏中偷取一件物品或消耗品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished merchant with a large operation under their command.
ast.target: 一位成就斐然的商人，掌控着庞大的产业。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to off er a target a dangerous bargain for something they want or need. If used on a PC, they must make a Presence Reaction Roll (17). On a failure, they must mark 2 Stress or take the deal.
ast.target: 向一个目标提出一项危险的交易，以换取他们想要或需要的东西。如果用于玩家角色，他们必须进行一次存在感反应检定（17）。失败时，他们必须标记2点压力或接受交易。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4+1 Tier 1 adversaries, who appear at Far range, to enforce the Baron’s will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记1点压力，召唤1d4+1个1级对手，他们出现在远距离，以执行男爵的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive bull-headed firbolg with a quick temper.
ast.target: 一个脾气暴躁的巨型牛头人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Minotaur. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须花费1点恐惧来聚焦牛头人。被聚焦时，它可以对范围内的所有目标进行其标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range, moving the Minotaur into Melee range of them. On a success, deal 2d8 direct physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的目标发动一次攻击，将牛头人移动到其近战距离内。成功时，造成2d8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An undead figure wearing a heavy leather coat, with searching eyes and a casually cruel demeanor.
ast.target: 一个穿着厚重皮衣的亡灵身影，眼神锐利，举止随意而残忍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hunter makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当猎人成功发动攻击时，远距离内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to curse a target within Very Close range with a necrotic Deathlock until the end of the scene. Attacks made by the Hunter against a Deathlocked target deal direct damage. The Hunter can only maintain one Deathlock at a time.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标施加一个死灵死亡锁，持续到场景结束。猎人对被死亡锁定的目标发动的攻击造成直接伤害。猎人一次只能维持一个死亡锁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚焦1d4个盟友。以这种方式被聚焦时，他们发动的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Hunter is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, move the Hunter in a straight line to a point within Far range and make an attack against all targets in their path. Targets the Hunter succeeds against take 2d8+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环1d6）。当猎人首次被聚焦时，激活倒计时。触发时，猎人沿直线移动至远距离内的一个点，并对路径上的所有目标发动一次攻击。猎人命中的目标受到2d8+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A high-ranking courtier with the ear of the local nobility.
ast.target: 一位能影响当地贵族的高级廷臣。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who rolls less than 17 on an action roll targeting the Advisor must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 玩家角色针对顾问的行动检定结果低于17时，必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to influence an NPC within Melee range with whispered words. That target’s opinion on one matter shifts toward the Advisor’s preference unless it is in direct opposition to the target’s motives.
ast.target: 通过低语影响近战距离内的一个NPC。该目标对某一事项的看法将向顾问的偏好转变，除非这与目标的动机直接冲突。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to convince a crowd or notable individual that one person or group is responsible for some problem facing the target. The target becomes hostile to the scapegoat until convinced of their innocence with a successful Presence Roll (17).
ast.target: 说服一群民众或一个重要人物，认为某个人或团体应为他们面临的问题负责。目标对替罪羊变得敌对，直到通过一次成功的存在感检定（17）确信其清白。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clandestine leader with a direct channel to the Fallen Gods.
ast.target: 一位与堕落神祇有直接联系的秘密领袖。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧，聚焦1d4个盟友。以这种方式被聚焦时，他们发动的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight an ally within Far range, mark a Stress to gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当你聚焦一个远距离内的盟友时，标记1点压力以获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (6). When the Secret-Keeper is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When they mark HP, tick down this countdown by the number of HP marked. When it triggers, summon a Minor Demon who appears at Close range.
ast.target: 倒计时（6）。当秘密守护者首次被聚焦时，激活倒计时。当其标记生命值时，此倒计时减少所标记的生命值数量。触发时，召唤一个次级恶魔，它出现在近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, when the Secret- Keeper marks 2 or more HP, you can mark a Stress to summon a Demonic Hound Pack, which appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 每场景一次，当秘密守护者标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以标记1点压力，召唤一个恶魔猎犬群，它们出现在近距离，并立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large aquatic predator, always on the move.
ast.target: 一种大型水生掠食者，总在游动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功发动攻击时，远距离内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功发动攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽，但无法获得其增益（他们仍可使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记一个生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range of the Shark marks HP from another creature’s attack, you can mark a Stress to immediately spotlight the Shark, moving them into Melee range of the target and making a standard attack.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼近战范围内的生物因其他生物的攻击而标记生命值时，你可以标记一个压力值，立即将鲨鱼聚焦，使其移动至目标近战范围内并进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A half-fish person with shimmering scales and an irresistible voice.
ast.target: 一个半人半鱼的存在，身披闪烁的鳞片，拥有难以抗拒的嗓音。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Siren makes a standard attack against a target Entranced by their song, the attack deals 2d10+1 damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果塞壬对一个被其歌声迷惑的目标发动标准攻击，该攻击造成2d10+1点伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with an ethereal bow, unable to move on while their charge is vulnerable.
ast.target: 一个幽灵般的战士，手持灵体长弓，因其守护对象仍处险境而无法安息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 弓箭手对物理伤害具有抗性。标记一个压力值，可穿过固体物体移动至远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack within Far range against a PC who is within Very Close range of at least two other PCs. On a success, the target takes 2d8+12 physical damage.
ast.target: 对一名处于极近范围内且附近至少有两名其他玩家的角色发动远距范围内的攻击。成功时，目标受到2d8+12点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly commander leading their troops beyond death.
ast.target: 一位幽灵般的指挥官，率领其部队超越死亡继续作战。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Captain has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 队长对物理伤害具有抗性。标记一个压力值，可穿过固体物体移动至远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to return up to 1d4+1 defeated Spectral allies to the battle at the points where they first appeared (with no marked HP or Stress).
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧值，使最多1d4+1名被击败的幽灵盟友在它们最初出现的位置重返战场（无已标记的生命值或压力值）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain’s Spectral allies are forced to make a reaction roll, you can mark a Stress to give those allies a +2 bonus to the roll.
ast.target: 当队长的幽灵盟友被迫进行反应检定时，你可以标记一个压力值，为这些盟友的检定提供+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with spears and swords, anchored by duty.
ast.target: 一个幽灵般的战士，手持长矛与利剑，因职责而锚定于此。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 守卫者对物理伤害具有抗性。标记一个压力值，可穿过固体物体移动至远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+6 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对一名处于极近范围内的目标发动攻击。成功时，造成2d10+6点物理伤害，且目标必须标记一个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skilled espionage agent with a knack for being in the right place to overhear secrets.
ast.target: 一位技艺精湛的间谍，擅长在恰当地点窃听秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to describe how the Spy knows a secret about a PC in the scene.
ast.target: 描述间谍如何知晓场景中某位玩家角色的秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC or group is discussing something sensitive, you can mark a Stress to reveal that the Spy is present in the scene, observing them. If the Spy escapes the scene to report their findings, you gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色或群体正在讨论敏感事项时，你可以标记一个压力值，揭示间谍正在场景中观察他们。如果间谍逃离场景去汇报其发现，你获得1d4点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A prowling hunter, like a slinking mountain lion, with a slate-gray stone body.
ast.target: 一个潜行的猎手，如同潜行的山狮，身躯由板岩灰色的岩石构成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are Hidden and immune to all damage.
ast.target: 石行者能像在空气中一样轻松地穿越岩石与泥土。身处岩石或泥土中时，它们处于隐匿状态，且免疫所有伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While Hidden, mark a Stress to leap into Melee range with a target within Very Close range. The target must succeed on an Agility or Instinct Reaction Roll (15) or take 2d8 physical damage and become temporarily Restrained.
ast.target: 处于隐匿状态时，标记一个压力值，可跃入极近范围内一名目标的近战范围。目标必须成功通过一次敏捷或直觉反应检定（难度15），否则受到2d8点物理伤害并暂时被束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to roar while within a cave and cause a cave-in. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take 2d10 physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (8).
ast.target: 在洞穴内发出咆哮，引发塌方。所有近距范围内的目标必须成功通过一次敏捷反应检定（难度14），否则受到2d10点物理伤害。瓦砾可通过一个进度倒计时（8）来清除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当石行者成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A battle-hardened mage trained in destructive magic.
ast.target: 一位身经百战的法师，精通破坏性魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before or after making a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to teleport to a location within Far range.
ast.target: 在进行标准攻击之前或之后，你可以标记一个压力值，传送至远距范围内的一个位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to refresh the Wizard’s “Warding Sphere” reaction.
ast.target: 刷新法师的“守护法球”反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to unleash a precise hail of magical blasts. All targets in the scene must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 释放精准的魔法弹幕。场景中所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Wizard takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal 2d6 magic damage to the attacker. This reaction can’t be used again until the Wizard refreshes it with their “Refresh Warding Sphere” action.
ast.target: 当法师受到近距范围内攻击的伤害时，对攻击者造成2d6点魔法伤害。此反应在法师通过“刷新守护法球”动作刷新前无法再次使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A winged insect the size of a large house with iridescent scales and wings that move too fast to track.
ast.target: 一只翼展如大型房屋般大小的飞虫，身披虹彩鳞片，翅膀振动快得难以追踪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Flickerfly can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 闪烁飞虫在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可被聚焦四次。如常消耗恐惧值来聚焦它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly makes an attack, the target’s Evasion is halved against the attack.
ast.target: 当闪烁飞虫发动攻击时，目标的闪避值在该次攻击中减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Flickerfly can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 飞行时，闪烁飞虫在采取行动前可移动至远距范围，而非近距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to whirl, making an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Flickerfly succeeds against take 3d8 direct physical damage.
ast.target: 旋转身体，对极近范围内的所有目标发动攻击。闪烁飞虫成功命中的目标受到3d8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to take half damage.
ast.target: 当闪烁飞虫受到近距范围内攻击的伤害时，你可以标记一个压力值，使伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A regal cloaked monstrosity with circular horns adorned with treasure.
ast.target: 一位身披斗篷的威严怪物，环形犄角上装饰着珍宝。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a bonus to the Demon’s attack rolls equal to the number of handfuls of gold they have.
ast.target: 恶魔的攻击检定获得加值，加值等于其拥有的金币把数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 3 handfuls of gold (or a Fear) to spotlight 1d4+1 allies.
ast.target: 消耗3把金币（或1点恐惧值），聚焦1d4+1名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cloaked demon-creature with long limbs, seeping shadows.
ast.target: 一个身披斗篷的恶魔生物，四肢修长，阴影渗出。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Demon deals double damage to PCs with 0 Hope.
ast.target: 恶魔对希望值为0的玩家角色造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to weigh down the spirits of all PCs within Far range. All targets aff ected replace their Hope Die with a d8 until they roll a success with Hope or their next rest.
ast.target: 压制远距范围内所有玩家角色的精神。所有受影响的目标将希望骰替换为d8，直到他们用希望骰掷出成功或下次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC fails with Fear, you can mark a Stress to cause all other PCs within Close range to lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色因恐惧而失败时，你可以标记一个压力值，使近距范围内所有其他玩家角色失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A perfectly beautiful and infinitely cruel demon with a gleaming spear and elegant robes.
ast.target: 一个完美美丽且无限残忍的恶魔，手持闪亮长矛，身着优雅长袍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Demon makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range must lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当恶魔成功发动攻击时，远距范围内所有玩家角色必须失去1点希望值，且你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC within Far range fails a roll, they can choose to reroll their Fear Die and take the new result. If they still fail, they mark 2 Stress and the Demon clears a Stress.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在远距范围内检定失败时，他们可以选择重掷恐惧骰并接受新结果。如果仍然失败，他们标记2点压力值，且恶魔清除1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to deal the Demon’s standard attack damage to a target within Close range.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的一个目标造成恶魔的标准攻击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight two other Demons within Far range.
ast.target: 聚焦远距范围内的另外两名恶魔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC fails a roll within Close range of the Demon, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在恶魔近距范围内检定失败时，他们必须标记一个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fickle creature of spindly limbs and insatiable desires.
ast.target: 一个善变的生物，四肢纤细，欲望永不满足。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Demon’s standard attack deals direct damage.
ast.target: 恶魔的标准攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Demon marks HP from an attack, spend a number of Fear equal to the HP marked by the Demon to cause the attacker to mark the same number of HP.
ast.target: 当恶魔因攻击而标记生命值时，消耗等同于恶魔所标记生命值数量的恐惧值，使攻击者标记相同数量的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range takes damage from a diff erent adversary, you can mark a Stress to add a d4 to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的一个生物受到不同敌人的伤害时，你可以标记一个压力值，为伤害检定增加一个d4。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC takes Severe damage within Very Close range of the Demon, you can spend a Fear to cause the target to make a Finesse Reaction Roll. On a failure, the Demon seizes one item or consumable of their choice from the target’s inventory.
ast.target: 当一名PC在恶魔的极近距离内受到严重伤害时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，迫使目标进行一次敏捷反应检定。若失败，恶魔可以从目标的物品栏中夺取一件他们选择的物品或消耗品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A hulking demon with boulder-sized fists, driven by endless rage.
ast.target: 一个拥有巨石般拳头、被无尽愤怒驱使的庞大恶魔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Demon’s attacks deal direct damage.
ast.target: 恶魔的攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to boil the blood of all PCs within Far range. They use a d20 as their Fear Die until the end of the scene.
ast.target: 沸腾远距离内所有PC的血液。他们使用一个d20作为恐惧骰，直到场景结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Demon takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当恶魔在近距离内受到攻击伤害时，你可以标记一点压力值，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 6). Activate the first time an attack is made within sight of the Demon. It ticks down when a PC takes a violent action. When it triggers, summon 1d4 Minor Demons, who appear at Close range.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环6）。首次在恶魔视线内发动攻击时激活。当PC采取暴力行动时，倒计时减少。当它触发时，召唤1d4个小恶魔，它们出现在近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A wide-winged pet endlessly loyal to their vampire owner.
ast.target: 一只对其吸血鬼主人无限忠诚的宽翼宠物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Bat gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，蝙蝠的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to send a high-pitch screech out toward all targets in front of the Bat within Far range. Those targets must mark 1d4 Stress.
ast.target: 向蝙蝠远距离内前方的所有目标发出一声高频尖叫。那些目标必须标记1d4点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an allied Vampire marks HP, you can mark a Stress to fly into Melee range of the attacker and make an attack with advantage against them. On a success, deal 2d6+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 当一名盟友吸血鬼标记生命值时，你可以标记一点压力值，飞入攻击者的近战距离，并对他们进行一次具有优势的攻击。若成功，造成2d6+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nature spirit in the form of a humanoid tree.
ast.target: 一个以人形树木形态出现的自然精灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Create a patch of thorns that covers an area within Close range of that point. All targets within that area take 2d6+2 physical damage when they act. A target must succeed on a Finesse Roll or deal more than 20 damage to the Dryad with an attack to leave the area.
ast.target: 以远距离内的一点为目标。在该点近距离范围内创造一片荆棘区域。该区域内所有目标在行动时受到2d6+2点物理伤害。目标必须成功通过一次敏捷检定，或对树精造成超过20点伤害的攻击，才能离开该区域。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to grow three Treant Sapling Minions, who appear at Close range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 生长出三个树人幼苗仆从，它们出现在近距离并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an ally dies within Close range, you can spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress as the fallen ally’s life force is returned to the forest.
ast.target: 当一名盟友在近距离内死亡时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，清除2点生命值和2点压力值，因为倒下盟友的生命力已回归森林。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A blazing mote of elemental fire.
ast.target: 一团燃烧的元素火焰微粒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Elemental is defeated when they take any damage. For every 9 damage a PC deals to the Elemental, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当元素受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对元素造成9点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击成功范围内的仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Elemental Sparks within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚光灯所有在其近距离内的元素火花。那些仆从移动到目标的近战距离，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，每个造成5点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living landslide of boulders and dust, as large as a house.
ast.target: 一场由巨石和尘土组成的、如房屋般巨大的活体山崩。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Elemental and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Elemental and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚光灯元素且其状态栏上没有标记时，它们还不能行动。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述它们正在准备做什么。当你聚光灯元素且其状态栏上有标记时，清除标记，它们可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Elemental makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can’t mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当元素成功攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽，但不获得其收益（他们仍然可以使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果他们无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记一点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An attack that would move the Elemental moves them two fewer ranges (for example, Far becomes Very Close). When the Elemental takes physical damage, reduce it by 7.
ast.target: 一次能移动元素的攻击，会使其移动距离减少两个范围等级（例如，远距离变为极近距离）。当元素受到物理伤害时，减少7点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A huge living wave that crashes down upon enemies.
ast.target: 一道巨大的活体波浪，向敌人猛扑而下。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d4+7 physical damage and the target’s next action has disadvantage. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 攻击极近距离内的一个目标。若成功，造成2d4+7点物理伤害，且目标的下一次行动具有劣势。若失败，目标必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against become Restrained and Vulnerable as they begin drowning. A target can break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次攻击。元素成功命中的目标会变得束缚且脆弱，因为他们开始溺水。目标可以通过一次成功的力量或本能检定挣脱，结束两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Elemental makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to knock the target back to Close range.
ast.target: 当元素成功进行标准攻击时，你可以标记一点压力值，将目标击退至近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A translucent green mound of acid taller than most humans.
ast.target: 一个比大多数人还高的、半透明的绿色酸液土丘。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze has 4 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Green Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.
ast.target: 当软泥怪标记了4点或更多生命值时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，将其分裂成两个绿色软泥怪（没有已标记的生命值或压力值）。立即聚光灯两者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A quadrupedal scaled beast with multiple long-necked heads, each filled with menacing fangs.
ast.target: 一只四足的鳞甲野兽，拥有多个长颈头颅，每个头颅都长满骇人的獠牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Hydra begins with three heads and can have up to five. When the Hydra takes Major or greater damage, they lose a head.
ast.target: 九头蛇初始有三个头，最多可拥有五个。当九头蛇受到重大或更高伤害时，它们会失去一个头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Hydra can be spotlighted X times per GM turn, where X is the Hydra’s number of heads. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 九头蛇在GM回合中可被聚光灯X次，X为九头蛇的头颅数量。照常消耗恐惧值来聚光灯它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Hydra has any marked HP, spend a Fear to clear a HP and grow two heads.
ast.target: 如果九头蛇有任何已标记的生命值，消耗一点恐惧值，清除一点生命值并生长出两个头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All PCs within Far range lose 2 Hope.
ast.target: 远距离内所有PC失去2点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hydra takes magic damage, they become Dazed until the next roll with Fear. While Dazed, they can’t use their Regeneration action but are immune to magic damage.
ast.target: 当九头蛇受到魔法伤害时，它们会变得眩晕，直到下一次带有恐惧的检定。眩晕期间，它们无法使用再生行动，但对魔法伤害免疫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sovereign ruler of a nation, wreathed in the privilege of tradition and wielding unmatched power in their domain.
ast.target: 一个国家的至高统治者，沐浴在传统的特权中，在其领域内掌握着无与伦比的权力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: per PC in the party to have the group condemned for crimes real or imagined. A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll can demand trial by combat or another special form of trial.
ast.target: 每名队伍中的PC，可让团队因真实或虚构的罪行而被定罪。一名PC若成功通过一次威仪检定，可以要求决斗审判或其他特殊形式的审判。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon six Tier 3 Minions, who appear at Close range to enforce the Monarch’s will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一点压力值，召唤六个3级仆从，它们出现在近距离以执行君主的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Long-Term Countdown (8). Spend a Fear to activate after the Monarch’s desire for war is first revealed. When it triggers, the Monarch has a reason to rally the nation to war and the support to act on that reason. You gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 长期倒计时（8）。在君主的战争欲望首次显露后，消耗一点恐惧值激活。当它触发时，君主有了一个理由来动员国家投入战争，并且有支持来采取行动。你获得1d4点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A knight with huge, majestic antlers wearing armor made of dangerous thorns.
ast.target: 一名骑士，头戴巨大而威严的鹿角，身穿由危险荆棘制成的盔甲。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 3d12+3 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当骑士从目标上方成功进行标准攻击时，他们造成3d12+3点物理伤害，而非标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take physical damage equal to 3d4 + the target’s Major threshold.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到等于3d4加上目标重大阈值的物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to deal 1d10+5 physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当骑士在近战距离内受到攻击伤害时，你可以标记一点压力值，对攻击者造成1d10+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一棵坚固的、有生命的古老树木。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before they make their first attack in a fight or after they become Hidden, the Treant is indistinguishable from other trees until they next act or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll to identify them.
ast.target: 在战斗中首次攻击之前或进入隐藏状态后，树人在下次行动前或PC成功通过本能检定识别它们之前，与其他树木无法区分。

ast.name: desc
