ast.source: and make an attack against up to three targets within Close range, pummeling them with giant acorns. Targets the Treant succeeds against take 2d10+5 physical damage.
ast.target: 并对近距离内最多三个目标进行一次攻击，用巨大的橡果猛击他们。树人成功命中的目标受到2d10+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Root the Treant in place. The Treant is Restrained while Rooted, and can end this eff ect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, the Treant has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 将树人扎根于原地。树人在扎根时处于束缚状态，并且可以在被聚光灯时结束此效果以代替移动。扎根时，树人对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当树苗受到任何伤害时即被击败。PC每对树苗造成6点伤害，就额外击败一个在攻击成功范围内的仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Treant Saplings within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 8 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚光灯所有在其近距离内的树人幼苗。那些仆从移动到目标的近战距离，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，每个造成8点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.
ast.target: 一位身着贵族华服、迷人的亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼成功攻击时，远距离内所有PC失去一点希望值，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 任何进入吸血鬼近战范围的生物都必须进行一次本能反应检定。若失败，你获得1d4点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is within Melee range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼处于盟友的近战范围内时，他们可以令该盟友标记1点生命值。随后吸血鬼清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4 Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，召唤1d4只吸血鬼，它们出现在远距离处并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a d8. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼获得聚光灯时，投掷一个d8。若结果为6或更高，所有极近距离内的目标必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator’s smile.
ast.target: 一种拥有血染双唇和掠食者般微笑的智能亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 5d4 physical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，造成5d4点物理伤害。因此次攻击而标记生命值的目标失去1点希望值，并必须标记1点压力值。随后吸血鬼清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can spend a Fear to take half damage.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼受到物理伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧来使伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on their torso.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘、箱形构造的构装体，其躯干上装有厚重的金属摆动门。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Creatures within Melee range of the Gaoler have disadvantage on attack rolls against them. Creatures trapped inside the Gaoler are immune to this feature.
ast.target: 狱卒近战范围内的生物对狱卒发动攻击时具有劣势。被困在狱卒内部的生物不受此特性影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is Restrained within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While Restrained, the target can only attack the Gaoler.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标被束缚在狱卒内部，直到通过一次成功的力量检定（难度18）被解救。在被束缚期间，目标只能攻击狱卒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘的金色构装体，拥有箱状的四肢和一只巨大的钉头锤作为手臂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel’s standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 被哨兵标准攻击命中的目标会被击退至极近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target within Very Close range to focus on. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls when they’re within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can only focus on one target at a time.
ast.target: 选择极近距离内的一个目标进行专注。当该目标处于哨兵的极近距离内时，其攻击检定具有劣势。哨兵一次只能专注一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8+20 magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren’t knocked back.
ast.target: 向远距离内的一点投掷爆炸性魔法。该点极近距离内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d8+20点魔法伤害，并被击退至近距离。成功的目标受到一半伤害且不会被击退。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当哨兵成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive living turret with reinforced armor and twelve pistondriven mechanical legs.
ast.target: 一座巨大的活体炮台，拥有强化装甲和十二条活塞驱动的机械腿。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Turret and they don’t have a token on their stat block, they can’t make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they’re preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.
ast.target: 当你将聚光灯给予炮台且其状态栏上没有标记物时，它无法进行标准攻击。在其状态栏上放置一个标记物，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你将聚光灯给予炮台且其状态栏上有标记物时，清除该标记物，它便可以攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Mark a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the Marked target becomes Hidden. While the target is Marked, their Evasion is halved.
ast.target: 标记远距离内的一个目标，直到炮台被摧毁或被标记的目标进入隐藏状态。当目标被标记时，其闪避值减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can mark a Stress to add the Turret’s standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个对手对炮台远距离内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以标记1点压力值，将炮台的标准攻击伤害加到伤害检定中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d20 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 当炮台被摧毁时，它会爆炸。近距离内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d20点物理伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.
ast.target: 一条冰川蓝色的巨龙，拥有四条强健的肢体和带有霜气的双翼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Dragon can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 巨龙在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可获得三次聚光灯。照常消耗恐惧来给予其聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn’t mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果被巨龙伤害的目标没有标记护甲槽来减少伤害，他们必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在巨龙远距离内带着恐惧进行检定时，他们失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become Chilled until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
ast.target: 当一个生物在极近距离内成功攻击巨龙时，他们必须标记1点压力值，并进入“寒冷”状态，直到下次休息或他们清除1点压力值。在“寒冷”状态下，他们的攻击检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当巨龙成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.
ast.target: 一位身着深色破烂长袍的腐朽法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, or full damage if you spend a Fear.
ast.target: 将聚光灯给予1d4个盟友。以此方式获得聚光灯的盟友发动的攻击造成一半伤害，或者如果你消耗1点恐惧，则造成全额伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark 2 Stress to cause all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记2点压力值，使远距离内的所有目标进行一次力量反应检定。失败的目标受到2d20+12点魔法伤害，且你获得1点恐惧。成功的目标受到一半伤害。标记了2点或更多生命值的目标还必须标记2点压力值，并进入“易伤”状态，直到他们带着希望进行检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 召唤一支僵尸军团，它出现在近距离处并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Necromancer has marked 7 or more of their HP, you can spend a Fear to have them teleport away to a safe location to recover. A PC who succeeds on an Instinct Roll can trace the teleportation magic to their destination.
ast.target: 当死灵法师标记了7点或更多生命值时，你可以消耗1点恐惧，使其传送到一个安全地点进行恢复。成功通过本能检定的玩家角色可以追踪传送魔法至其目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears a number of Stress or HP equal to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环2d6）。当死灵法师标记了6点或更多生命值时，激活此倒计时。当它触发时，对近距离内的一个目标造成2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。随后死灵法师清除等同于该目标因此次攻击所标记生命值数量的压力值或生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen’s will.
ast.target: 一个被束缚于堕落者意志的诅咒灵魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 突击兵受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对突击兵造成12点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个该攻击能命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色因突击兵的攻击而标记生命值时，他们失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Fallen Shock Troops within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 12 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并将目标近距离内所有堕落突击兵获得聚光灯。这些爪牙移动至目标的近战范围，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，它们各造成12点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.
ast.target: 一位被其生前契约所束缚的强大法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 2d10+6 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 释放一场吞噬一切的火焰风暴，并对近距离内的所有目标发动攻击。术士成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. While trapped, the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.
ast.target: 将远距离内的一个目标困在其最深恐惧的强大幻象中。在被困期间，目标处于“束缚”和“易伤”状态，直到他们通过一次成功的本能检定挣脱，同时移除这两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.
ast.target: 当术士受到攻击伤害时，他们可以传送至多远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Fallen God, wreathed in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes’ spirits.
ast.target: 一位被愤怒与怨恨所笼罩的堕落神祇，拥有数千年粉碎英雄意志的经验。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Realm-Breaker can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 碎界者在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可获得两次聚光灯。照常消耗恐惧来给予其聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by 2d10.
ast.target: 当碎界者受到伤害时，减少2d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target uses armor to reduce damage from this attack, they must mark 2 Armor Slots.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标发动一次标准攻击。当目标使用护甲来减少此次攻击的伤害时，他们必须标记2个护甲槽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一个目标因碎界者的攻击而标记生命值时，该目标远距离内的所有玩家角色必须失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker marks their last HP, replace them with the Undefeated Champion and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当碎界者标记其最后一点生命值时，用不败冠军替换他们，并立即给予其聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.
ast.target: 唯有最令人恐惧之物，方有机会令其恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Undefeated Champion can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 不败冠军在每个游戏主持人回合中最多可获得三次聚光灯。照常消耗恐惧来给予其聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.
ast.target: 当不败冠军受到伤害时，减少1d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the HP they marked from this attack.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的所有目标发动一次标准攻击。被冠军成功命中的玩家角色失去等同于他们因此次攻击所标记生命值数量的希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.
ast.target: 召唤数量为玩家角色两倍的堕落突击兵。突击兵出现在远距离处。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当不败冠军对一名玩家角色造成成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当目标因不败冠军的攻击而标记生命值时，所有在目标远距离范围内的玩家角色失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 装备神圣弓箭的灵体士兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.
ast.target: 弓箭手对被高阶炽天使标记为有罪的目标造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against up to three targets.
ast.target: 对最多三个目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.
ast.target: 信徒的灵魂，被神圣的武器所升华。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 士兵受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对士兵造成13点伤害，就在攻击会成功的范围内额外击败一个仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Soldier is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当士兵处于飞行状态时，花费1点恐惧，可在采取行动前移动至远距离而非近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Hallowed Soldiers within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 10 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦其近距离范围内的所有圣化士兵。这些仆从移动至目标的近战距离，并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每个士兵造成10点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A divine champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god’s will.
ast.target: 一位神圣的冠军，统率着一支执行神明意志的圣化战士军团。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Seraph can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 炽天使在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦三次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当炽天使处于飞行状态时，花费1点恐惧，可在采取行动前移动至远距离而非近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to reflect a sliver of divinity as a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll, with disadvantage if they are marked Guilty. Targets who fail take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 反射一丝神性，化为一道灼热的光束，命中极远距离内最多二十个目标。目标必须进行一次存在反应检定，若被标记为有罪则处于劣势。失败的目标受到4d6+12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费1点恐惧，聚焦远距离内所有其他敌手。以此方式聚焦时，他们进行的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.
ast.target: 一头传奇的海兽，比最大的帆船还要庞大，长满吸盘的触手和骇人的巨口。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Kraken can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 海妖在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦三次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.
ast.target: 当海妖标记的生命值为7点或更少时，他们可以对范围内的两个目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+9 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 向一条直线上远距离内的任意数量目标喷射一道沸腾的水柱。所有目标必须成功通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则受到4d6+9点物理伤害。若目标标记护甲槽以减少伤害，他们还必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当海妖对一名玩家角色造成成功攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad outcomes.
ast.target: 一位高耸的不朽者，命运的化身，被诅咒只能看到糟糕的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当神谕者造成成功攻击时，所有远距离内的玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一个生物在神谕者极远距离范围内掷出失败时，他们必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 向远距离内的一个目标展示其个人噩梦的幻象。目标必须进行一次知识反应检定。失败时，他们失去所有希望，并受到2d20+4点直接魔法伤害。成功时，他们受到一半伤害并失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per day, spend 2 Fear to summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC’s personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.
ast.target: 每天一次，花费2点恐惧，召唤2d4个与某位玩家角色个人噩梦相关的2级或以下仆从。他们出现在该玩家角色的近距离处。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.
ast.target: 当神谕者看到一个凡俗生物时，他们瞬间知晓其个人噩梦之一。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can mark a Stress to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 当神谕者因极近距离内的攻击而标记生命值时，你可以标记1点压力，将攻击者击退至远距离，并造成2d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.
ast.target: 对生命的一种混乱嘲弄，不断变化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack modifier.
ast.target: 当畸变体攻击时，掷2d4，并将结果用作他们的攻击修正值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当目标因畸变体的攻击而受到伤害时，他们必须进行一次本能反应检定。失败时，他们下一次行动检定处于劣势，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination takes damage, reduce it by 1d2 0. If the Abomination marks 1 or fewer Hit Points from a successful attack against them, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当畸变体受到伤害时，减少1d2点伤害。如果畸变体因一次成功的攻击而标记1点或更少的生命值，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A shifting, formless mass seemingly made of chromatic light.
ast.target: 一团不断变化、无形无状的物质，似乎由彩色光芒构成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC takes damage from the Corrupter, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色因腐化者的攻击而受到伤害时，他们失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 向近距离内所有目标喷射部分消化的已吞噬现实碎片。目标必须成功通过一次知识反应检定，否则标记2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A vaguely humanoid form stripped of memory and identity.
ast.target: 一个模糊的人形，被剥夺了记忆和身份。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 奴仆受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对奴仆造成13点伤害，就在攻击会成功的范围内额外击败一个仆从。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Outer Realm Thralls within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 11 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦其近距离范围内的所有外域奴仆。这些仆从移动至目标的近战距离，并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每个奴仆造成11点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enraged by their wounds, the dragon bursts into molten lava.
ast.target: 被伤口激怒，巨龙爆裂成熔岩。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Molten Scourge can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 熔岩灾祸在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦三次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸受到伤害时，掷数量等于所标记生命值的d6。每个结果为4或更高的骰子，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 4d8+1 physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range. The Molten Scourge clears a Stress.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标进行攻击。成功时，目标受到4d8+1点物理伤害，失去1点希望，并被击退至近距离。熔岩灾祸清除1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from an attack within Very Close range, molten blood gushes from the wound and deals 2d10+4 direct physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸因极近距离内的攻击而受到严重伤害时，熔化的血液从伤口涌出，对攻击者造成2d10+4点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge marks their last HP, replace them with the Ashen Tyrant and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸标记其最后一点生命值时，将其替换为灰烬暴君，并立即聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp claws.
ast.target: 一头巨大的有翼生物，覆盖着黑曜石鳞片和锋利无比的爪子。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 黑曜石掠食者在每个游戏主持人回合最多可被聚焦两次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，黑曜石掠食者的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 黑曜石掠食者对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 4d6+4 physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.
ast.target: 对近距离内所有目标进行攻击。黑曜石掠食者成功命中的目标受到4d6+4点物理伤害，并被击退至远距离，且处于易伤状态，直到他们下一次带着希望掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Obsidian Predator is flying, mark a Stress to choose a point within Far range. Move to that point and make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 2d10+6 physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 如果黑曜石掠食者正在飞行，标记1点压力，选择远距离内的一点。移动至该点，并对极近距离内所有目标进行攻击。黑曜石掠食者成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点物理伤害，必须标记1点压力并失去1点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Obsidian Predator marks their last HP, replace them with the Molten Scourge and immediately spotlight them.
ast.target: 当黑曜石掠食者标记其最后一点生命值时，将其替换为熔岩灾祸，并立即聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: No enemy has ever had the insolence to wound the dragon so. As the lava settles, it’s ground to ash like the dragon’s past foes.
ast.target: 从未有敌人胆敢如此伤害巨龙。当熔岩冷却，它便如巨龙过往的敌人一般，化为灰烬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ashen Tyrant can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 灰烬暴君在每个GM回合中最多可被聚光灯照射四次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.
ast.target: 而非消耗一个恐惧值来为灰烬暴君聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，灰烬暴君的难度获得+1加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can’t lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当一名PC在灰烬暴君的近距离范围内掷骰失败时，他们失去1点希望值，你获得1点恐惧值。如果该PC无法失去希望值，则必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Ashen Tyrant succeeds against take 2d20+2 physical damage, are knocked back to Close range of where they were, and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 对近距离范围内的所有目标发动攻击。灰烬暴君攻击成功的目标受到2d20+2点物理伤害，被击退至其原位置的近距离范围，并必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. The ash cloud clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.
ast.target: 猛击地面，在远距离范围内扬起灰烬。处于灰烬云中的目标在进行行动掷骰时处于劣势。当下一个敌人被聚光时，灰烬云消散。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering, muscular zombie with magically infused strength and skill.
ast.target: 一个高大、肌肉发达的僵尸，拥有魔法灌注的力量与技巧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当僵尸攻击成功时，远距离范围内的所有PC失去1点希望值，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can’t spend Hope to use features against the Zombie.
ast.target: PC无法消耗希望值来对僵尸使用特性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Zombie succeeds against are Vulnerable until their next rest.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动一次标准攻击。僵尸攻击成功的目标在下次休息前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Very Close range of the Zombie, you can spend a Fear to add the Zombie’s standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个敌人对僵尸极近距离范围内的目标造成伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧值，将僵尸的标准攻击伤害加到伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large pack of undead, still powerful despite their rotting flesh.
ast.target: 一大群亡灵，尽管肉体腐烂，但依然强大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d6+5 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当军团已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成2d6+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 军团对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 军团在每个GM回合中最多可被聚光灯照射两次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion takes Minor damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack with advantage against the attacker.
ast.target: 当军团在近战范围内受到攻击并受到轻微伤害时，你可以标记1点压力值，对攻击者发动一次带有优势的标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A hideous, twisted giant born out of a rock, wearing purloined armor and a belt of severed heads.
ast.target: 一个从岩石中诞生的、丑陋扭曲的巨人，身穿偷来的盔甲，腰带由砍下的头颅制成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Troll can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 巨魔在每个GM回合中最多可被聚光灯照射三次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When combat begins, active a Countdown equal to the number of PCs. Whenever the Troll takes damage, tick down the countdown and reduce the HP the Troll marks by 1. When it triggers, the Troll evolves into an Enraged Mountain Troll (see “Enraged Mountain Troll - Evolution”).
ast.target: 战斗开始时，启动一个倒计时，数值等于PC的数量。每当巨魔受到伤害时，倒计时减少1，并且巨魔标记的生命值减少1点。当倒计时触发时，巨魔进化为狂怒山丘巨魔（见“狂怒山丘巨魔 - 进化”）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move the Troll up to Close range and immediately make two standard attacks against a single target within Melee range. If both attacks hit, combine the damage and the target also loses a Hope.
ast.target: 将巨魔移动至近距离范围，并立即对近战范围内的单一目标发动两次标准攻击。如果两次攻击都命中，则合并伤害，且目标失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: These cat-sized balls of hair, limbs, and teeth travel in a “mawb” of about a dozen.
ast.target: 这些猫大小的毛发、肢体和牙齿组成的球体，以大约一打的“颚群”形式旅行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Rabble Mawb has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当暴民颚兽标记了半数或更多生命值时，其标准攻击造成1d4物理伤害，而非原伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a Rabble Mawb is defeated, you can spend a Fear to bring this Rabble Mawb back to life. This new Rabble Mawb gains a +X bonus to all rolls, where X is the number of times this feature has been used by this adversary.
ast.target: 当一名暴民颚兽被击败时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值使其复活。这名新的暴民颚兽获得+X加值至所有掷骰，其中X为该对手使用此特性的次数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A pale, gaunt cult leader holding a seven-foot-tall rod with a candle made from a hanged man’s hand atop it.
ast.target: 一位苍白、憔悴的邪教领袖，手持一根七英尺高的权杖，杖顶是由绞死者之手制成的蜡烛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Candlemaker appears, put fi ve tokens on this stat block. Remove one token whenever the Candlemaker marks a HP. While this stat block has one or more tokens on it, the Candlemaker is Hidden.
ast.target: 当烛匠出现时，在此状态栏上放置五个标记。每当烛匠标记一点生命值时，移除一个标记。当此状态栏上有一个或多个标记时，烛匠处于隐藏状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The light of the Candlemaker’s hand of glory inspires bloodlust in their allies. While this stat block has one or more tokens on it, any Redcap within Close range gains a +1 bonus to their damage rolls.
ast.target: 烛匠的荣耀之手发出的光芒会激发盟友的嗜血欲望。当此状态栏上有一个或多个标记时，任何处于近距离范围内的红帽子获得+1加值至其伤害掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a token from this stat block. The Candlemaker conjures a ball of fi re at a point within Far range. All creatures within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d10 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 消耗此状态栏上的一个标记。烛匠在远距离范围内的一点召唤一个火球。该点极近距离范围内的所有生物必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到2d10魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A halfl ing-sized fey creature who hacks their victims apart with a variety of cutting implements.
ast.target: 一个半身人大小的精类生物，使用各种切割工具将受害者肢解。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against up to three targets within range. For each target who marks a HP, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 对最多三个范围内的目标进行一次标准攻击。每当一个目标标记一点生命值时，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Doppelhünd makes a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to make an additional standard attack. If both attacks target the same creature, combine the damage.
ast.target: 当变形犬进行一次标准攻击时，你可以标记一点压力值以进行一次额外的标准攻击。如果两次攻击都针对同一生物，则合并伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A knight clad in dragonplate armor and a helmet in the shape of a dragon’s head.
ast.target: 一位身披龙鳞铠甲、头戴龙首形头盔的骑士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Knight gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls when attacking a target from above.
ast.target: 当骑士从高处攻击目标时，其攻击掷骰获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Knight’s attack roll counts as a critical success if the result on the d20 is a 19 or a 20.
ast.target: 如果骑士的攻击掷骰d20结果为19或20，则视为大成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose a target within Far range. The Knight moves into Melee range of the target and make a standard attack against them. On a success, gain a +1d12 bonus to the damage roll and the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefi ts (they can still use armor to reduce the damage).
ast.target: 并选择一个远距离范围内的目标。骑士移动至该目标的近战距离内，并对其进行一次标准攻击。若成功，伤害掷骰获得+1d12加值，且目标必须标记一个护甲槽而不获得其收益（他们仍可使用护甲来减少伤害）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fl eshy, fl oating ball of teeth with ten jointed antennae rising from its crown, each bearing a diff erent-colored eye.
ast.target: 一个肉质的漂浮齿球，其冠部长出十条带关节的触须，每条触须上都有一颗不同颜色的眼睛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Gobstalker can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 在GM回合中，猎哥布林者最多可被聚光灯照射三次。照常消耗恐惧值来为其聚光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Gobstalker’s breath is so rancid it creates an invisible miasma that negates magical eff ects. Any attack that deals magic damage or creates a magical eff ect in front of the Gobstalker within Close range automatically fails. This feature does not aff ect the Gobstalker’s own features.
ast.target: 猎哥布林者的口气恶臭至极，会形成一种无形的瘴气，抵消魔法效果。任何在猎哥布林者近距离范围内造成魔法伤害或产生魔法效果的攻击都会自动失败。此特性不影响猎哥布林者自身的特性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A magically animated statue in the form of a terrifying beast or devil.
ast.target: 一座以恐怖野兽或恶魔形态呈现的魔法活化雕像。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Gargoyle is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 石像鬼对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before they make their fi rst attack in a fi ght or after they become Hidden, the Gargoyle is indistinguishable from a normal statue until they next act or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll to identify them.
ast.target: 在战斗中进行首次攻击之前，或在进入隐藏状态之后，石像鬼与普通雕像无法区分，直到其再次行动或玩家角色成功通过一次本能检定来识别它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a point within Far range. The Gargoyle moves to that point in a straight line and makes an attack against one target along its path.
ast.target: 选择一个远距离范围内的一点。石像鬼沿直线移动至该点，并对路径上的一个目标进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant, fi re-breathing monster with a lion’s head, a goat’s body, and a serpent’s tail.
ast.target: 一头巨大的喷火怪物，拥有狮首、羊身和蛇尾。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Chimera makes a successful attack, the target must mark 2 Armor Slots instead of 1 to reduce the damage by one threshold.
ast.target: 当奇美拉成功命中目标时，目标必须标记2个护甲槽而非1个，以将伤害降低一个阈值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target up to three PCs in front of the Chimera within Close range. All targets must make an Agility Reaction Roll (20). Targets who fail take 3d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed must to either mark an Armor Slot or mark a Stress.
ast.target: 以奇美拉前方近距离范围内的最多三名玩家角色为目标。所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰（20）。失败的目标受到3d12魔法伤害。成功的目标必须标记一个护甲槽或标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After the Chimera makes a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to make an additional standard attack. If both attacks target the same creature, combine the damage.
ast.target: 在奇美拉进行一次标准攻击后，你可以标记一点压力值以进行一次额外的标准攻击。如果两次攻击都针对同一生物，则合并伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The echoes of broken promises and dreams unfulfi lled, these wraiths appear as fl oating, translucent shrouds of tattered black velvet in a vaguely humanoid shape.
ast.target: 破碎承诺与未竟梦想的回响，这些怨灵以漂浮的、半透明的破烂黑天鹅绒裹尸布形态出现，呈模糊的人形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Wraith is immune to physical damage and weak against magic damage. Additionally, the Wraith can move through solid objects.
ast.target: 怨灵免疫物理伤害，但对魔法伤害脆弱。此外，怨灵可以穿过固体物体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Wraith makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range must mark a Stress and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当怨灵成功命中目标时，近距离范围内的所有玩家角色必须标记一点压力值，且你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shade of a forgotten ruler, cursed to patrol the skies atop a winged eel in the service of an evil demiurge.
ast.target: 一位被遗忘的统治者的幽魂，被诅咒骑着一条飞鳗巡逻天空，为一位邪恶的造物主服务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shadow King gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls while in shadow or darkness and a −1 penalty to attack and damage rolls while in bright light.
ast.target: 暗影之王在阴影或黑暗中时，攻击和伤害检定获得+1加值；在明亮光线下时，攻击和伤害检定承受-1减值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shadow King has advantage on attacks against PCs with magical weapons or armor equipped.
ast.target: 暗影之王对装备魔法武器或护甲的玩家角色发动攻击时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Three times per scene, you can spend a Fear to have an adversary within Far range of the Shadow King reroll a missed attack with advantage.
ast.target: 每场场景三次，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，令暗影之王远距范围内的一名敌人重投一次未命中攻击，并使其获得优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A huge mer-creature who lures unwary prey into eating range with their dangling, shapeshifting head stalk.
ast.target: 一种巨大的半人半鱼生物，通过其悬垂的、可变形的头部触须诱骗粗心的猎物进入其捕食范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to play an alluring overture to a PC within Close range. The PC must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (18) or move into Melee range with the Beguiler. If the Beguiler’s head stalk is in a form the PC would fi nd trustworthy, they have disadvantage on the reaction roll.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的一名玩家角色演奏一段诱人的序曲。该玩家角色必须通过一次存在反应检定（18），否则将移动至魅惑者的近战距离内。如果玩家角色认为魅惑者的头部触须形态值得信赖，他们在反应检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Beguiler takes the spotlight with a Swallowed creature inside them, they move to Far range away from the PCs.
ast.target: 当魅惑者获得聚光灯且体内有被吞噬的生物时，他们会移动至玩家角色远距范围之外。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A heavenly host of winged humanoids whose song calls forth tears of religious awe.
ast.target: 一群有翼人形生物组成的天界军团，他们的歌声能唤起宗教敬畏的泪水。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Choir has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d8+3 magic damage instead.
ast.target: 当圣歌团的生命值损失达到一半或更多时，他们的标准攻击改为造成2d8+3点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Choir unleash divine energy. Remove all tokens from this stat block (see “Celestia Coda”). For each token removed, deal 1d12 direct magic damage to all enemies within Close range.
ast.target: 令圣歌团释放神圣能量。移除此状态栏上的所有标记（见“天界尾声”）。每移除一个标记，对近距范围内的所有敌人造成1d12点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant, vengeful barn owl with a 15-foot wingspan and a human face.
ast.target: 一只巨大的、复仇心切的仓鸮，翼展达15英尺，拥有一张人脸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC within Close range makes an action roll, their Fear Die gains a bonus equal to the amount of Fear you currently have.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的玩家角色进行动作检定时，他们的恐惧骰获得加值，加值等于你当前拥有的恐惧值数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Owl Witch is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 猫头鹰女巫对魔法伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Owl Witch can perfectly mimic the voice of a loved one or trusted fi gure. Spend a Fear to have the Owl Witch call out to a creature within earshot. The target must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or move up to Far range toward the Owl Witch.
ast.target: 猫头鹰女巫能完美模仿挚爱之人或可信赖人物的声音。消耗一点恐惧值，令猫头鹰女巫呼唤听力范围内的一个生物。目标必须通过一次本能反应检定，否则将向猫头鹰女巫移动最多远距距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have the Owl Witch Affl ict a target within Far range with waking nightmares. Until a PC uses a downtime move to comfort the Affl icted creature and clear the condition, the Affl icted creature can’t clear Stress or HP by any means.
ast.target: 令猫头鹰女巫对远距范围内的一个目标施加清醒噩梦。在玩家角色使用休息动作安慰受折磨的生物并清除该状态之前，受折磨的生物无法通过任何方式清除压力值或生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Owl Witch is targeted by an attack, you can spend a Fear to force the attacker to make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they mark 1d4 Stress as their mind is fl ooded with visions of their own violent death.
ast.target: 当猫头鹰女巫被攻击选中时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，迫使攻击者进行一次存在反应检定。若失败，他们标记1d4点压力值，因为他们的脑海中充满了自己暴力死亡的幻象。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一只城堡大小的双足爬行动物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Xero can be spotlighted up to X times per GM turn, where X is the number of PCs in the scene. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 泽罗在游戏主持人回合中最多可获得X次聚光灯，X等于场景中的玩家角色数量。照常消耗恐惧值为其提供聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Xero’s movement cannot be hindered, impeded, or aff ected by any external eff ect. All destructible terrain or obstacles in Xero’s path are destroyed when Xero moves through them.
ast.target: 泽罗的移动无法被任何外部效果阻碍、妨碍或影响。泽罗路径上所有可破坏的地形或障碍物在泽罗穿过时被摧毁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move Xero up to Close range. All creatures Xero moves through must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail must mark 2 Armor Slots or take Severe Damage.
ast.target: 令泽罗移动最多近距距离。所有被泽罗穿过的生物必须进行一次力量反应检定。失败的目标必须标记2个护甲槽或承受严重伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Up to three times per scene, spend any number of Fear to clear an equal number of HP.
ast.target: 每场场景最多三次，消耗任意数量的恐惧值，清除等量的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A robe-wearing, squid-headed humanoid from the Outer Realms.
ast.target: 一个来自外域的、穿着长袍的、长着鱿鱼头的人形生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: and choose up to three targets within Close range to make a Knowledge or Instinct Reaction Roll (20). Targets who succeed take 2d10+5 direct magical damage. Targets who fail take 4d10+10 direct magical damage and are Vulnerable until spotlighted.
ast.target: 并选择近距范围内最多三个目标进行一次知识或本能反应检定（20）。成功的目标受到2d10+5点直接魔法伤害。失败的目标受到4d10+10点直接魔法伤害，并在获得聚光灯前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Priest succeeds on a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to Restrain the target until they spend a Hope to clear this condition.
ast.target: 当祭司的标准攻击成功时，你可以标记一点压力值来束缚目标，直到他们消耗一点希望值来清除该状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ancient warrior, buried with the gate to protect entry; their skeletal mass is armored and their curved blade is deadly.
ast.target: 一位与守门之物一同埋葬的古老战士；他们的骸骨身躯披着铠甲，弯刀致命。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. When the Guardian takes physical damage from a PC within Melee range, the PC is pushed anywhere up to Very Close range of where it stood.
ast.target: 守卫者对物理伤害具有抗性。当守卫者受到近战距离内玩家角色的物理伤害时，该玩家角色被推离原位置最多极近距距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against every PC within Very Close range in front of the Guardian.
ast.target: 对守卫者正前方极近距范围内的所有玩家角色发动攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Guardian takes physical damage from an attack, you can spend a Fear to call a Skeleton Dredge from a near
ast.target: 当守卫者受到攻击的物理伤害时，你可以消耗一点恐惧值，从附近召唤一具骷髅清道夫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Velk Dravenmoor, wounded and corrupted by dark powers, swells into a feral terror, frenzied and murderous.
ast.target: 维尔克·德雷文穆尔，被黑暗力量所伤并腐化，膨胀成一头狂野的恐怖生物，狂暴而嗜杀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Velk can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight him.
ast.target: 维尔克在游戏主持人回合中最多可获得两次聚光灯。照常消耗恐惧值为其提供聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to allow Velk to leap anywhere within Far range and make an attack. On a success, he deals an additional 1d12 damage.
ast.target: 允许维尔克跳跃至远距范围内任意位置并发动攻击。若成功，他额外造成1d12点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的所有目标发动标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 1d8+3 physical damage and the target must make a Strength Reaction Roll (13) or be moved anywhere within Close range.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，造成1d8+3点物理伤害，且目标必须通过一次力量反应检定（13），否则将被移动至近距范围内任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Limb Wreath's attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因肢体花环的攻击而标记生命值的目标还必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack roll against up to 3 targets within Close range. Any you succeed against take 1d8+2 physical damage and must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (13) or be pulled in Melee range of the Limb Wreath.
ast.target: 对近距范围内最多3个目标进行攻击检定。任何你成功命中的目标受到1d8+2点物理伤害，且必须通过一次力量反应检定（13），否则将被拉至肢体花环的近战距离内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes 2d8 physical damage, and the Limb Wreath clears 2 HP.
ast.target: 对近战距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d8点物理伤害，且肢体花环清除2点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Limb Wreath marks 2 or more HP from an attack, you can mark a Stress to create a Living Tentacle within Very Close range. The Tentacle is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 当肢体花环因攻击标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以标记一点压力值，在极近距范围内创造一条活体触须。该触须立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A part of the Limb Wreath is severed, twitching and moving on its own.
ast.target: 肢体花环的一部分被切断，抽搐着自行移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Tentacle's attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 因触须的攻击而标记生命值的目标还必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Tentacle is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to a Tentacle, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 触须受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对触须造成5点伤害，额外击败攻击范围内一个会被命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Tentacles within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚光灯其近距范围内的所有触须。这些爪牙移动至目标的近战距离内，并进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，每个触须造成2点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mutated, feral predators covered in patchy fur and scales, their claws deadly and their barbed tails venomous.
ast.target: 变异的、野生的掠食者，覆盖着斑驳的皮毛和鳞片，爪子致命，带刺的尾巴有毒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a Pain Beast attacks a target within Very Close range of another Pain Beast, the attack has advantage.
ast.target: 当痛苦野兽攻击另一个痛苦野兽极近距范围内的目标时，该攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to move anywhere within Far range and make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d8+4 physical damage and marks a Stress.
ast.target: 移动至远距范围内任意位置，并对极近距范围内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d8+4点物理伤害并标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack roll against a target within Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d8 physical damage and, if they mark any number of HP, becomes Infected until they heal any number of HP. While Infected, they have disadvantage on action rolls.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的一个目标进行攻击检定。若成功，目标受到2d8点物理伤害，且如果他们标记了任意数量的生命值，则进入感染状态，直到他们恢复任意数量的生命值。感染期间，他们在动作检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If an attacker is within Very Close range when the Pain Beast marks 2 or more HP, spend a Fear to deal 1d8+3 physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 如果在痛苦野兽标记2点或更多生命值时，攻击者在其极近距范围内，消耗一点恐惧值对攻击者造成1d8+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive nexus of forest will and dark magic, this tower of rotting flesh and fungal might seeks to increase its mass.
ast.target: 森林意志与黑暗魔法的巨大节点，这座由腐烂血肉和真菌力量构成的高塔试图增加其质量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who fail an action or roll with Fear within Close range of the Rotlord must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 在腐烂之王近距范围内进行动作或恐惧检定失败的目标必须标记一点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to conjure 2 Caustic Fungus anywhere within Close range. These Fungus are immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 在近距范围内任意位置召唤2个腐蚀真菌。这些真菌立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range cannot mark a Stress and instead must mark HP, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的一个生物无法标记压力值而必须标记生命值时，你获得一点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The underbrush of the Screaming Forest has a hive mind of its own.
ast.target: 尖啸森林的下层灌木拥有自己的群体意识。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Caustic Fungus is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to a Caustic Fungus, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 腐蚀真菌受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对腐蚀真菌造成4点伤害，即可额外击败攻击范围内一个可被命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who are successfully hit by the Fungus' attacks must also mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits.
ast.target: 被真菌攻击成功命中的目标还必须标记一个护甲槽，且不获得其增益。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Caustic Fungus within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦其近距离范围内所有腐蚀真菌。这些爪牙移动至目标近战范围内，进行一次共享攻击检定。若成功，每个爪牙造成2点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seekers for Mother, they collect what might please her.
ast.target: 为母后寻找，她们收集可能取悦母后之物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 1d8+3 physical damage and must make a Instinct Reaction Roll (13). On a failure, they become Asleep until they take damage, or until 1d4 hours have passed. While Asleep, a PC cannot be spotlighted.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到1d8+3点物理伤害，并必须进行一次本能反应检定（13）。若失败，目标陷入沉睡，直至受到伤害或经过1d4小时。沉睡期间，玩家角色无法被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make a target within Close range roll an Agility Reaction Roll (13). On a failure, they are Restrained and Vulnerable until they succeed on a Strength or Agility Action Roll (15).
ast.target: 令近距离内的一个目标进行一次敏捷反应检定（13）。若失败，目标被束缚且易伤，直至其力量或敏捷行动检定（15）成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Mother of the Hive, she seeks materials and subjects to conduct her strange biological experiments on.
ast.target: 蜂巢之母，她寻找材料和实验对象，以进行她奇异的生物实验。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before Mother makes an attack, roll a d6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target's Evasion is halved against the attack.
ast.target: 在母后发动攻击前，掷一个d6。若结果为4或更高，目标的闪避值在此次攻击中减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Close range. On a success, Mother deals 2d6+10 physical damage.
ast.target: 对近距离内所有目标发动攻击。若成功，母后造成2d6+10点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Mother marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, a cloud of caustic mist emits from her abdomen and all PCs within Very Close range mark an Armor Slot.
ast.target: 当母后因极近距离内的攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时，一团腐蚀性雾气从她腹部喷出，所有极近距离内的玩家角色标记一个护甲槽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Mother makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当母后成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering being of sorrow and service, forever doomed to wander at Terrorgut's behest.
ast.target: 一个由悲伤与侍奉构成的巨物，注定永远在恐怖之喉的驱使下徘徊。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Thrall and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Thrall and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚焦仆从且其属性栏上没有标记时，他们无法行动。在其属性栏上放置一个标记，并描述他们正在准备做什么。当你聚焦仆从且其属性栏上有标记时，清除标记，他们可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An attack that would move the Thrall moves them two fewer range steps, and the Thrall must succeed on a Reaction Roll (10). On a failure, it falls over and becomes temporarily Restrained and Vulnerable. When it is no longer Restrained, it also is no longer Vulnerable.
ast.target: 一次会移动仆从的攻击，其移动距离减少两个范围等级，且仆从必须通过一次反应检定（10）。若失败，仆从倒下，暂时被束缚且易伤。当其不再被束缚时，也不再易伤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 2d12+7 physical damage, is Restrained, and has disadvantage on attack rolls until they succeed on a Strength or Agility Action Roll (16).
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d12+7点物理伤害，被束缚，并且攻击检定具有劣势，直至其力量或敏捷行动检定（16）成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target and any PCs in the cage take 2d12+15 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标以及笼中的所有玩家角色受到2d12+15点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Thrall makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当仆从成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: when the Thrall marks 2 or more HP from a PC attack within Very Close range. Then, immediately make an attack against the attacker. On a success, they take 2d6+7 physical damage and are pushed to Far range.
ast.target: 当仆从因极近距离内玩家角色的攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时。然后，立即对攻击者发动一次攻击。若成功，攻击者受到2d6+7点物理伤害，并被推至远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d6+8 physical damage and must make a Instinct Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they become Asleep until they take damage, or until 1d4 hours have passed. While Asleep, a PC cannot be spotlighted.
ast.target: 对极近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d6+8点物理伤害，并必须进行一次本能反应检定（15）。若失败，目标陷入沉睡，直至受到伤害或经过1d4小时。沉睡期间，玩家角色无法被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ravenous demon unleashed through dark magic, it claims its domain to enslave and devour the souls of those who fail to bend to its will.
ast.target: 一个通过黑暗魔法释放的贪婪恶魔，它占据领地，奴役并吞噬那些不屈服于其意志者的灵魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Terrorgut makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当恐怖之喉成功发动攻击时，远距离内所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Terrorgut takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.
ast.target: 当恐怖之喉受到物理伤害时，该伤害减少3点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to create a Shambling Zombie within Very Close range. The Shambling Zombie is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 在极近距离内创造一个蹒跚僵尸。该蹒跚僵尸立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you mark 2 or more HP from a PC attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress and roll an attack against the attacker. On a success, they take 2d10+10 physical damage, mark a Stress, and are pulled into Melee range.
ast.target: 当你因近距离内玩家角色的攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以标记1点压力，并对攻击者发动一次攻击。若成功，攻击者受到2d10+10点物理伤害，标记1点压力，并被拉入近战范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A hardened cutthroat and thief who hunts for the Queens.
ast.target: 一位为女王们狩猎的冷酷杀手与窃贼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ambusher succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 2d10+8 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当伏击者成功发动一次具有优势的标准攻击时，其造成2d10+8点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Become Hidden until after the Ambusher's next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
ast.target: 进入隐藏状态，直至伏击者的下一次攻击之后。通过此特性隐藏时发动的攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A crew of cackling killers relishing in chaos and plunder.
ast.target: 一群在混乱与掠夺中狂欢的咯咯笑杀手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Band has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当帮派已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成2d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target of the Band's attack marks 2 or more HP, you can mark a Stress to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 当帮派攻击的目标标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以标记1点压力，令极近距离内所有目标失去1点希望。若目标无法失去希望，则必须改为标记2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged raiders of the Damask Queens.
ast.target: 大马士革女王们的远程掠夺者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Squad has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当小队已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d6+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Any you succeed against take 1d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 瞄准远距离内的一个点。对该点近距离内所有目标发动一次具有优势的攻击。任何被你命中的目标受到1d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14). On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half.
ast.target: 瞄准远距离内的一个点。直至下一次带有恐惧的掷骰前，移动至该点近距离内的生物必须进行一次敏捷反应检定（14）。若失败，受到2d6+3点物理伤害。若成功，伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The once beloved protector of the weald now stews in corruption, half-mad and seeking blood for their blade as penance for the land's decay.
ast.target: 曾经备受爱戴的林地守护者，如今深陷腐化，半疯半狂，为土地的衰败寻求以血偿债。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Fane Guardian can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
ast.target: 神殿守卫在每个主持人回合中最多可被聚焦两次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦他们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A flame of ancient magic still burns within the Fane Warden. Whenever a PC would cause the Fane Warden to heal HP or Stress, start a Progress Countdown (4), reducing it by 1 each additional time it would be healed one HP or Stress. When this countdown would count below 1, the Warden is restored.
ast.target: 神殿守卫体内仍燃烧着古老魔法的火焰。每当玩家角色将导致神殿守卫生命值或压力恢复时，启动一个进度倒计时（4），每额外恢复一点生命值或压力，倒计时减少1。当此倒计时将低于1时，守卫被净化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against every target within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d10+8 physical damage and must make a Strength Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they are pushed away to Far range of their location.
ast.target: 对极近距离内每个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d10+8点物理伤害，并必须进行一次力量反应检定（15）。若失败，目标被推离至其位置的远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have a target within Far range make a Strength Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they are pulled to anywhere within Very Close range of the Fane Warden and the Fane Warden immediately makes an attack against them.
ast.target: 令远距离内的一个目标进行一次力量反应检定（15）。若失败，目标被拉至神殿守卫极近距离内任意位置，且神殿守卫立即对其发动一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to Root the Fane Warden in place. Fane Warden is Restrained while Rooted, and can end this effect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, Fane Warden has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 将神殿守卫扎根于原地。扎根时，神殿守卫被束缚，并可在被聚焦时以此效果代替移动。扎根期间，神殿守卫对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Fane Warden marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Fane Warden deals 2d10+8 physical damage and the target is pushed to Far range.
ast.target: 当神殿守卫因极近距离内的攻击而标记2点或更多生命值时，标记1点压力，对攻击者发动一次标准攻击。若成功，神殿守卫造成2d10+8点物理伤害，目标被推至远距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Her holy mission slandered and her compassion punished for audacity, a darker power became seeded within her buried and bound soul. The Grand Ordinants created their own dark prophesy.
ast.target: 她的神圣使命被诽谤，她的慈悲因胆大妄为而受罚，一股更黑暗的力量在她被埋葬与束缚的灵魂中生根。大主教们创造了他们自己的黑暗预言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Evelyar can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight her.
ast.target: 伊芙莉亚在每个主持人回合中最多可被聚焦两次。照常花费恐惧来聚焦她。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar takes damage, reduce it by the number of Profane Disciples within Close range. When a PC marks their last HP within Close range of Evelyar, she heals a HP and clears a Stress.
ast.target: 当伊芙莉亚受到伤害时，该伤害减少等于其近距离内亵渎门徒数量的点数。当一名玩家角色在伊芙莉亚近距离内标记其最后一点生命值时，她恢复1点生命值并清除1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. On a success, they take 2d8+5 physical damage.
ast.target: 对极近距离内所有目标发动攻击。若成功，目标受到2d8+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make during this spotlight deal half damage.
ast.target: 聚焦1d4+1个盟友。他们在此聚焦期间发动的攻击造成半额伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to have a PC within Very Close range make an Insight or Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they mark a Stress, they become Vulnerable until they roll a success with Hope, and Evelyar heals 2 HP.
ast.target: 令极近距离内的一名玩家角色进行一次洞察或存在反应检定。若失败，玩家角色标记1点压力，变得易伤直至其掷出带有希望的成功，且伊芙莉亚恢复2点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当伊芙莉亚成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One of the disciples of Evelyar, betrayed by the clergy and forgotten with their heretical Saint. Their vengeful furvor is fueled by Evelyar's madness.
ast.target: 伊芙莉亚的门徒之一，被神职人员背叛，与他们异端的圣人一同被遗忘。他们复仇的狂热由伊芙莉亚的疯狂所点燃。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Disciple is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Disciple is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
ast.target: 当门徒处于一个生物的近战范围内，且至少另一名门徒处于其近距离范围内时，对该生物的所有攻击均具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When Evelyar takes damage from an attack within Very Close range of the Disciple, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当埃维拉在信徒的极近距离内受到攻击伤害时，标记一个压力值，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Description: A nimble folk with serrated blades and cunning tactics.
ast.target: 描述：一种敏捷的种族，拥有锯齿状刀刃和狡猾的战术。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make an attack roll against all targets within Melee range. Any they succeed against are blasted backwards, dealing 2d6+3 magic damage and pushing them into Far range.
ast.target: 对所有近战范围内的目标进行一次攻击检定。任何成功命中的目标都会被向后击退，受到2d6+3点魔法伤害，并被推至远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A quick and deadly striker who waits for the perfect moment to strike.
ast.target: 一位迅捷致命的打击者，等待着完美的攻击时机。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ambusher enters the scene without being spotted first, they can immediately move into Melee with a target and make an attack against them. On a success, they strike with their dagger for 2d4+8 physical damage.
ast.target: 当伏击者未被事先发现而进入场景时，他们可以立即移动至与目标近战距离，并对其发动一次攻击。成功时，他们用匕首刺击，造成2d4+8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A wolf-owl pack hunter with wings and a rotating head.
ast.target: 一种拥有翅膀和可旋转头部的狼鸮群猎手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When making a Bite and Claw attack, if another Strixwolf is also in Melee range of the target, deal 2d8+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当进行撕咬与爪击攻击时，如果另一只鸮狼也在目标的近战范围内，则改为造成2d8+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This creature ignores the Hidden condition on anyone within Close range.
ast.target: 此生物无视近战范围内任何目标的隐匿状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to make the Strixwolf take flight, increasing their Difficulty by +2 and making their attacks worth +2 damage until the Strixwolf lands.
ast.target: 使鸮狼起飞，使其难度等级+2，并使其攻击伤害+2，直至鸮狼着陆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weathered remains of a long-forgotten warrior, animated by dark magic.
ast.target: 一位被遗忘已久的战士的风化遗骸，由黑暗魔法驱动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to choose a target and spotlight all Ancient Skeletons within Close range of them. Those creatures move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
ast.target: 选择一个目标，并聚焦于其近战范围内的所有远古骷髅。这些生物移动至目标的近战范围内，并进行一次共享攻击检定。成功时，每个造成4点物理伤害。合并此伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A spectral entity born from ancient sorrow, feeding on fear and memory.
ast.target: 一个由古老悲伤诞生的幽灵实体，以恐惧和记忆为食。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Forest Wraith has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 森林怨灵对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack roll against a Close target. On a success, the Forest Wraith flies into Melee and places their hand upon the target's cheek. Ask the player to describe a terrifying moment from their character's childhood. Then deal 3d4+9 magic damage and make them Vulnerable until their next rest.
ast.target: 对一个近战范围内的目标进行一次攻击检定。成功时，森林怨灵飞入近战距离，将手放在目标的脸颊上。请玩家描述其角色童年中一个恐怖的时刻。然后造成3d4+9点魔法伤害，并使其在下次休息前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An amphibious bull-sized hybrid with springing legs and a powerful tongue.
ast.target: 一种两栖的公牛大小混合体，拥有弹跳的腿和强大的舌头。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 1d8+4 physical damage and pull the target into Melee.
ast.target: 对一个近战范围内的目标发动攻击。成功时，造成1d8+4点物理伤害，并将目标拉入近战距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: to leap forward, making an attack with the Bullfrog's horns against all enemies in a straight line within Close range. Any that are hit take 2d4+8 physical damage and mark one armor slot that does not reduce any damage. The PC may still mark armor to reduce damage.
ast.target: 向前跳跃，用牛蛙的角对近战范围内一条直线上的所有敌人发动攻击。任何被击中的目标受到2d4+8点物理伤害，并标记一个护甲槽，该槽位不减少任何伤害。玩家角色仍可标记护甲来减少伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever an attack against this creature misses, the Bullfrog may leap anywhere within Far range.
ast.target: 每当对此生物的攻击未命中时，牛蛙可以跳跃至远距离范围内的任意位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large reptile-fish hybrid with a powerful jaw and predatory instincts.
ast.target: 一种大型爬行-鱼类混合体，拥有强大的下颚和捕食本能。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a successful Bite attack, mark a Stress to lock this creature's jaw onto the target, dealing 1 additional hit point and making them Restrained until the Eeligator is dealt Major damage. When released, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当撕咬攻击成功时，标记一个压力值，将此生物的下颚锁定在目标上，造成1点额外生命值伤害，并使其处于束缚状态，直至鳗鳄受到重大伤害。当目标被释放时，必须标记一个压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A former druidic grove lying fallow and fully reclaimed by nature.
ast.target: 一个曾经的德鲁伊林地，现已休耕并完全被自然重新占据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set to catch an unsuspecting party off-guard.
ast.target: 一次伏击被设置，以在毫无防备的队伍措手不及之际发动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set by the PCs to catch unsuspecting adversaries off-guard.
ast.target: 玩家角色设置了一次伏击，以在毫无防备的对手措手不及之际发动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The economic heart of the settlement, with local artisans, traveling merchants, and patrons across social classes.
ast.target: 定居点的经济中心，拥有本地工匠、旅行商人和跨越社会阶层的赞助人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A steep, rocky cliff side tall enough to make traversal dangerous.
ast.target: 一个陡峭、岩石嶙峋的悬崖侧面，高度足以使通行变得危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lively tavern that serves as the social hub for its town.
ast.target: 一个热闹的酒馆，作为其所在城镇的社交中心。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small town on the outskirts of a nation or region, close to a dungeon, tombs, or other adventuring destinations.
ast.target: 一个位于国家或地区边缘的小镇，靠近地牢、墓穴或其他冒险目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swift-moving river without a bridge crossing, deep enough to sweep away most people.
ast.target: 一条水流湍急、没有桥梁横渡的河流，深度足以冲走大多数人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Fallen cult assembles around a sigil of the defeated gods and a bonfire that burns a sickly shade of green.
ast.target: 一个堕落教团围绕着被击败神祇的符文和一堆燃烧着病态绿色火焰的篝火聚集。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A bustling but well-kept temple that provides healing and hosts regular services, overseen by a priest or seraph.
ast.target: 一座繁忙但维护良好的神殿，提供治疗并定期举办仪式，由一位牧师或炽天使主持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An abandoned city populated by the restless spirits of eras past.
ast.target: 一座被过往时代不安灵魂占据的废弃城市。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Stony peaks that pierce the clouds, with a twisting path winding its way up and over through many switchbacks.
ast.target: 刺破云层的石峰，一条蜿蜒的小径通过许多发夹弯盘旋而上并翻越。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Thick indigo ash fills the air around a towering moss-covered tree that burns eternally with flames a sickly shade of blue.
ast.target: 浓密的靛蓝色灰烬弥漫在空气中的高耸苔藓覆盖树木周围，树木永恒燃烧着病态蓝色的火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An active siege with an attacking force fighting to gain entry to a fortified castle.
ast.target: 一场活跃的围攻，攻击方正奋力攻入一座设防的城堡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive combat between two large groups of armed combatants.
ast.target: 两大群武装战斗者之间的一场大规模战斗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An otherworldly space where the laws of reality are unstable and dangerous.
ast.target: 一个现实法则不稳定且危险的异界空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive ritual designed to breach the gates of the Hallows Above and unseat the New Gods themselves.
ast.target: 一场旨在突破圣殿之门、推翻新神的巨大仪式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The majestic domain of a powerful empire, lavishly appointed with stolen treasures.
ast.target: 一个强大帝国的宏伟领地，奢华地装饰着掠夺来的珍宝。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A community-wide celebration featuring way too much drink, food, and fun.
ast.target: 一场社区范围的庆典，充斥着过量的酒水、食物和娱乐。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The party must gain access to a hidden or well-protected location to acquire the information or items secured within.
ast.target: 队伍必须进入一个隐蔽或戒备森严的地点，以获取其中保护的信息或物品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A harsh and alien landscape that shines with towers of glittering crystal.
ast.target: 一片严酷而陌生的景观，闪耀着水晶塔的光芒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A sprawling metropolis at the nexus of creation, where influential fi gures from across the realms gather.
ast.target: 一座位于创造枢纽的庞大都市，来自各个领域的有影响力人物在此聚集。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A shabby but well-defended hideout nestled among the brambles of the Sablewood.
ast.target: 一个简陋但防御严密的藏身处，坐落在黑木林的荆棘丛中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Fortified and well-kept tunnels leading to underborne communities within the great forest.
ast.target: 坚固且维护良好的隧道，通往大森林内的地下社区。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small but friendly village nestled into the heart of the Sablewood.
ast.target: 一个坐落在黑木林中心的小而友好的村庄。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A vast, windswept expanse of rolling grassland and ancient stone monuments.
ast.target: 一片广阔、狂风肆虐的起伏草原和古老的石碑。"},{"i":38","t":"等级

ast.name: name
ast.source: The Best Muscle Money Can Buy
ast.target: 金钱能买到的最好打手

ast.name: name
ast.source: I Have Never Known Defeat (Phase Change)
ast.target: 我从未尝过败绩（阶段转换）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 到我身边来，我的孩子们！

ast.name: name
ast.source: What’s the Talk of the Town?

ast.name: name
ast.source: It’d Be a Shame If Something Happened to Your Store
ast.target: 要是你的店出了什么事就太可惜了

ast.name: name
ast.target: 错误的地点，错误的时间

ast.name: name
ast.source: Adrift on a Sea of Steel

ast.name: name
ast.source: Everything You Are This Place Will Take from You

ast.name: name
ast.target: 你们难道不觉得有趣吗？

ast.name: name
ast.source: An Off er You Can’t Refuse
ast.target: 一个你无法拒绝的提议

ast.name: name
ast.source: A Series of Passageways, All Alike

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 每点生命值对应的成员数（例如5）

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 时钟名称（例如风暴来袭）

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 例如“为什么这个特性会发生？”

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Young Dryad, two Sylvan Soldiers, and a number of Minor Treants equal to the number of PCs appear to confront the party for their intrusion.
ast.target: 一名年轻的树精、两名森林士兵以及数量等同于玩家角色数量的小型树人出现，因队伍的闯入而前来对峙。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon a Minor Chaos Elemental drawn to the echoes of violence and discord. They appear within Far range of a chosen PC and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 召唤一个被暴力与纷争回响吸引而来的小型混沌元素。它们出现在选定玩家角色的远射程范围内，并立即成为焦点。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Difficulty of this environment equals that of the adversary with the highest Difficulty.
ast.target: 此环境的难度等于难度最高的对手的难度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The ambushers reveal themselves to the party, you gain 2 Fear, and the spotlight immediately shifts to one of the ambushing adversaries.
ast.target: 伏击者向队伍现身，你获得2点恐惧值，焦点立即转移到其中一名伏击对手身上。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC starts the ambush on unsuspecting adversaries, you lose 2 Fear and the first attack roll a PC makes has advantage.
ast.target: 当PC对毫无防备的敌人发动伏击时，你失去2点恐惧值，且PC进行的第一次攻击掷骰获得优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PCs can gain advantage on a Presence Roll by off ering a handful of gold as part of the interaction.
ast.target: PC可以通过在互动中提供一把金币，在魅力掷骰上获得优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal to the PCs that one of the merchants has something they want or need, such as food from their home, a rare book, magical components, a dubious treasure map, or a magical key.
ast.target: 向PC们揭示，其中一位商人拥有他们想要或需要的东西，例如来自家乡的食物、一本稀有书籍、魔法材料、一张可疑的藏宝图，或是一把魔法钥匙。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When one of the PCs splits from the group, the crowds shift and cut them off from the party.
ast.target: 当其中一名PC与队伍分开时，人群会移动并切断他们与队伍的联系。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Climbing up the cliff side uses a Progress Countdown (12). It ticks down according to the following criteria when the PCs make an action roll to climb:
ast.target: 攀爬悬崖侧面需要一个进度倒计时（12）。当PC进行攀爬行动掷骰时，根据以下标准减少倒计时：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Previous climbers left behind large metal rods that climbers can use to aid their ascent. If a PC using the pitons fails an action roll to climb, they can mark a Stress instead of ticking the countdown up.
ast.target: 之前的攀登者留下了大型金属杆，攀登者可以用来辅助攀爬。如果一名使用岩钉的PC在攀爬行动掷骰失败，他们可以选择标记压力值，而不是增加倒计时。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to have a PC’s handhold fail, plummeting them toward the ground. If they aren’t saved on the next action, they hit the ground and tick up the countdown by 2. The PC takes 1d12 physical damage if the countdown is between 8 and 12, 2d12 between 4 and 7, and 3d12 at 3 or lower.
ast.target: 导致PC的手抓点失效，使他们向地面坠落。如果他们在下一次行动中未被救下，他们将撞击地面，并使倒计时增加2。如果倒计时在8到12之间，PC受到1d12点物理伤害；在4到7之间，受到2d12点伤害；在3或更低时，受到3d12点伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can perform one time for the guests by making a Presence Roll. On a success, they earn 1d4 handfuls of gold (2d4 if they critically succeed). On a failure, they mark a Stress.
ast.target: PC可以通过进行一次魅力掷骰来为宾客表演一次。成功时，他们获得1d4把金币（大成功则为2d4）。失败时，他们标记压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal a stranger concealing their identity, lurking in a shaded booth.
ast.target: 揭示一个隐藏身份、潜伏在阴暗隔间里的陌生人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Introduce a significant NPC who wants to hire the party for something or who relates to a PC’s background.
ast.target: 引入一位重要的NPC，他想要雇佣队伍做某事，或者与某位PC的背景有关。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Gossip is the fastest-traveling currency in the realm. A PC can inquire about major events by making a Presence Roll. What they learn depends on the outcome of their roll, based on the following criteria:
ast.target: 流言是王国中传播最快的货币。PC可以通过进行魅力掷骰来打听重大事件。他们了解到的内容取决于掷骰结果，基于以下标准：

ast.name: text
ast.source: An adventuring society maintains a chapterhouse here, where heroes trade boasts and rumors, drink to their imagined successes, and scheme to undermine their rivals.
ast.target: 一个冒险者协会在此设有分会所，英雄们在这里吹嘘和交换传闻，为想象中的成功干杯，并密谋削弱他们的对手。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Another adventuring party is here, seeking the same treasure or leads as the PCs.
ast.target: 另一支冒险队伍也在这里，寻找着与PC们相同的宝藏或线索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The PCs witness as agents of a local crime boss shake down a general goods store.
ast.target: PC们目睹当地犯罪头目的手下正在敲诈一家杂货店。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Crossing the river requires the party to complete a Progress Countdown (4). A PC who rolls a failure with Fear is immediately targeted by the “Undertow” action without requiring a Fear to be spent on the feature.
ast.target: 渡河需要队伍完成一个进度倒计时（4）。一名在恐惧中掷骰失败的PC会立即被“暗流”行动锁定，无需为此特性消耗恐惧值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to catch a PC in the undertow. They must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 1d6+1 physical damage and are moved a Close distance down the river, becoming Vulnerable until they get out of the river. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 将PC卷入暗流。他们必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败时，他们受到1d6+1点物理伤害，并被向下游移动近距离距离，变得易伤状态直到离开河流。成功时，他们必须标记压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon a Glass Snake within Close range of a chosen PC. The Snake appears in or near the river and immediately takes the spotlight to use their “Spinning Serpent” action.
ast.target: 在选定PC的近距离范围内召唤一条玻璃蛇。蛇出现在河流中或附近，并立即获得聚光灯，使用其“旋转巨蛇”行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cultists dedicated this place to the Fallen Gods, and their foul influence seeps into it. Reduce the PCs’ Hope Die to a d10 while in this environment. The desecration can be removed with a Progress Countdown (6).
ast.target: 邪教徒将此地献给了堕落之神，他们邪恶的影响渗透其中。在此环境中，将PC的希望骰降为d10。这种亵渎可以通过一个进度倒计时（6）来消除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the ritual’s leader is targeted by an attack or spell, an ally within Very Close range of them can mark a Stress to be targeted by that attack or spell instead.
ast.target: 如果仪式的领导者被攻击或法术锁定，他们极近范围内的一名盟友可以标记压力值，以代替他们成为该攻击或法术的目标。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC who takes a rest in the Hallowed Temple automatically clears all HP.
ast.target: 在神圣殿堂中休息的PC会自动清除所有生命值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC who prays to a deity while in the Hallowed Temple can make an Instinct Roll to receive answers. If the god they beseech isn’t welcome in this temple, the roll is made with disadvantage.
ast.target: 在神圣殿堂中向神灵祈祷的PC可以进行一次直觉掷骰以获得答案。如果他们祈求的神灵不被此殿堂欢迎，则该掷骰带有劣势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Once per scene, each PC can mark a Stress to turn a result with Fear into a result with Hope.
ast.target: 每场场景一次，每名PC可以标记压力值，将带有恐惧的结果转变为带有希望的结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the PCs have trespassed, blasphemed, or off ended the clergy, you can spend a Fear to summon a High Seraph and 1d4 Bladed Guards within Close range of the senior priest to reinforce their will.
ast.target: 当PC们亵渎、冒犯或得罪了神职人员时，你可以消耗1点恐惧值，在高级祭司的近距离范围内召唤一位高阶炽天使和1d4名刃卫，以强化他们的意志。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The city has countless mysteries to unfold. A PC who seeks knowledge about the fallen city can make an Instinct or Knowledge Roll to learn about this place and discover (potentially haunted) loot.
ast.target: 这座城市有无数谜团待解。一名寻求关于这座陨落城市知识的PC可以进行直觉或知识掷骰，以了解此地并发现（可能闹鬼的）战利品。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Adversaries who appear here are of a ghostly form. They have resistance to physical damage and can mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 在此出现的敌人呈幽灵形态。他们对物理伤害有抗性，并可以标记压力值，穿过固体物体移动至近距离范围。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the PCs enter the raptors’ hunting grounds, two Giant Eagles appear at Very Far range of a chosen PC, identifying the PCs as likely prey.
ast.target: 当PC们进入猛禽的狩猎场时，两只巨鹰出现在选定PC的极远距离处，将PC们识别为可能的猎物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 4). When the PCs enter the mountain pass, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all characters traveling through the pass must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or mark a Stress. A PC wearing clothes appropriate for extreme cold gains advantage on these rolls.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环4）。当PC们进入山口时，激活倒计时。当它触发时，所有穿越山口的角色必须成功通过一次力量反应掷骰，否则标记压力值。穿着适合极寒天气衣物的PC在这些掷骰中获得优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC makes a Spellcast Roll, they must roll two Fear Dice and take the higher result.
ast.target: 当PC进行施法掷骰时，他们必须掷两个恐惧骰，并取较高的结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: PCs who approach the central tree can make a Knowledge Roll to try to identify the magic that consumed this environment.
ast.target: 接近中央树木的PC可以进行知识掷骰，尝试识别吞噬此环境的魔法。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warped animals wreathed in indigo flame trample through a point of your choice. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+3 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage instead.
ast.target: 被靛蓝火焰缠绕的扭曲动物践踏过你选择的一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到3d12+3点物理伤害。成功的目标则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can find or recall a secret way into the castle with a successful Instinct or Knowledge Roll.
ast.target: PC可以通过成功的直觉或知识掷骰，找到或回忆起进入城堡的秘密通道。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Summon a Knight of the Realm, a number of Tier 3 Minions equal to the number of PCs, and two adversaries of your choice within Far range of a chosen PC as reinforcements. The Knight of the Realm immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 在选定PC的远距离范围内，召唤一位王国骑士、数量等于PC数量的3级爪牙，以及你选择的两名敌人作为援军。王国骑士立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When an adversary is defeated, you can spend a Fear to have a stray attack from a siege weapon hit a point on the battlefield. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll.
ast.target: 当一名敌人被击败时，你可以消耗1点恐惧值，让攻城武器的一次流弹击中战场上的一个点。该点极近范围内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应掷骰。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Traversing a battlefield during an active combat is extremely dangerous. A PC must succeed on an Agility Roll to move at all, and can only go up to Close range on a success. If an adversary is within Melee range of them, they must mark a Stress to make an Agility Roll to move.
ast.target: 在活跃战斗期间穿越战场极其危险。PC必须成功通过敏捷掷骰才能移动，且成功时最多只能移动近距离。如果一名敌人处于他们近战范围内，他们必须标记压力值才能进行敏捷掷骰以移动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The attacking force raises the stakes by lighting a fire, stealing a valuable asset, kidnapping an important person, or killing the populace.
ast.target: 进攻方通过点燃大火、窃取贵重资产、绑架重要人物或杀害平民来提高赌注。

ast.name: text
ast.source: as a mage from one side uses large-scale destructive magic. Pick a point on the battlefield within Very Far range of the mage. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+8 magic damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一方的一名法师使用大规模破坏性魔法时。在法师极远距离范围内选择一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应掷骰。失败的目标受到3d12+8点魔法伤害，并必须标记压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Up is down, down is right, right is starward. Gravity and directionality themselves are in flux, and any attempt to move through this realm is an odyssey unto itself, requiring a Progress Countdown (8). On a failure, a PC must mark a Stress in addition to the roll’s other consequences.
ast.target: 上变为下，下变为右，右变为星界方向。重力和方向性本身处于变动之中，任何穿越此领域的尝试都是一次奥德赛，需要一个进度倒计时（8）。失败时，PC除了掷骰的其他后果外，还必须标记压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to force a PC to make a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 4d10 direct magic damage. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 迫使PC进行力量反应掷骰。失败时，他们受到4d10点直接魔法伤害。成功时，他们必须标记压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On a result with Fear, you can ask the PC to describe which of their fears the Chaos Realm evokes as a vision of reality unmakes and reconstitutes itself to the PC. The PC loses a Hope. If it is their last Hope, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 在带有恐惧的结果时，你可以要求PC描述当混沌领域唤起他们恐惧的景象，现实被解构并重组时，他们感受到了何种恐惧。PC失去1点希望值。如果这是他们最后一点希望值，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a PC critically succeeds, they can spend 2 Hope to refresh an ability normally limited by uses (such as once per rest, once per session).
ast.target: 当PC大成功时，他们可以消耗2点希望值来刷新一个通常受使用次数限制的能力（例如每休息一次、每场一次）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4+2 Fallen Shock Troops that appear within Close range of the Usurper to assist their divine siege. Immediately spotlight the Shock Troops to use a “Group Attack” action.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧值，召唤1d4+2名堕落突击兵，他们出现在篡位者的近距离范围内，协助其神圣围攻。立即让突击兵获得聚光灯，使用“群体攻击”行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On any failure with Fear against the Usurper, the PC must mark 1d4 Stress from the backlash of magical power.
ast.target: 在任何针对篡位者的、带有恐惧的失败中，PC必须因魔法力量的反噬而标记1d4点压力值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: While in the Imperial Court, a PC has disadvantage on Presence Rolls made to take actions that don’t fit the imperial way of life or support the empire’s dominance.
ast.target: 在帝国宫廷期间，PC进行的、旨在采取不符合帝国生活方式或支持帝国统治行动的魅力掷骰带有劣势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to tick down a long-term countdown related to the empire’s agenda by 1d4. If this triggers the countdown, a proclamation related to the agenda is announced at court as the plan is executed.
ast.target: 使与帝国议程相关的长期倒计时减少1d4。如果这触发了倒计时，一项与该议程相关的公告将在宫廷宣布，计划随之执行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A feature or action that clears HP requires spending a Hope to use. If it already costs Hope, a PC must spend an additional Hope.
ast.target: 一个清除生命值的特性或行动需要消耗1点希望值才能使用。如果它已经消耗希望值，PC必须额外消耗1点希望值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A PC can investigate the library and laboratory and make a Knowledge Roll to learn information related to arcana, local history, and the Necromancer’s plans.
ast.target: PC可以调查图书馆和实验室，并进行知识掷骰，以了解与奥秘、当地历史和亡灵法师计划相关的信息。

ast.name: text
