ast.source: All targets within Close range of a point you choose in this environment must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d8+8 physical damage from skeletal shrapnel as part of the ossuary detonates around them.
ast.target: 你在此环境中选择的一个点，其近距离范围内的所有目标必须成功通过敏捷反应掷骰，否则将因部分骨骸爆炸而受到4d8+8点物理伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Once per scene, roll a d4. Each undead within Far range of the Necromancer can clear HP and Stress equal to the result rolled. The undead can choose how that number is divided between HP and Stress.
ast.target: 每场场景一次，掷一个d4。亡灵法师远距离范围内的每个亡灵可以清除等于该结果数值的生命值和压力值。亡灵可以选择如何在生命值和压力值之间分配该数值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon 1d6 Rotted Zombies, two Perfected Zombies, or a Zombie Legion, who appear at Close range of a chosen PC.
ast.target: 召唤1d6具腐烂僵尸、两具完美僵尸或一支僵尸军团，他们出现在选定PC的近距离范围内。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Everyone is here to have a good time. PCs have advantage on Presence rolls to socialize with other revelers.
ast.target: 每个人都是来玩得开心的。PC在与其他狂欢者社交的魅力掷骰中获得优势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the Progress Countdown triggers, the party acquires the object of the Heist and must succeed on a group action roll to escape without being caught. On a failure, each PC marks a Stress and takes 2d12 direct damage.
ast.target: 当进度倒计时触发时，队伍获得抢劫目标物品，并必须通过一次群体行动检定才能逃脱而不被抓住。失败时，每个角色标记一点压力，并受到2d12点直接伤害。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The crystals here reverberate with magical energy. A PC can make a downtime move to try and Attune to the environment with a successful Spellcast Roll. Spellcast Rolls made by an Attuned PC inside the Crystal Wasteland have advantage. A PC clears the condition when they leave the wasteland.
ast.target: 此处的水晶与魔法能量产生共鸣。角色可以进行一次休整行动，尝试通过成功的施法检定来与环境共鸣。在水晶荒原内，已共鸣角色进行的施法检定具有优势。当角色离开荒原时，该状态被清除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Convergence is a nexus of gods, monsters, aliens, and all manner of dimension-hoppers. Because mortal life is generally beneath these beings’ concern, PCs have disadvantage on action rolls to infl uence them unless they have leverage against them or know what the NPC cares about.
ast.target: 汇聚之城是神祇、怪物、外星人以及各种维度穿越者的交汇点。由于凡人的生命通常不在这些存在的关注范围内，角色在试图影响他们的行动检定中处于劣势，除非他们掌握了对方的把柄或知晓该NPC在意之事。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The city of Convergence has a portal or door to every plane of existence.
ast.target: 汇聚之城拥有通往每个存在位面的传送门或入口。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This city has the solution to any problem, if you can fi nd it. A PC seeking a particular item with wondrous properties can make an Instinct or Presence Roll to fi nd it in the city’s pandimensional marketplace.
ast.target: 这座城市拥有解决任何问题的方法，只要你能找到它。寻找具有神奇特性的特定物品的角色，可以进行一次本能或魅力检定，以在城市的跨维度市场中找到它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 1d8+4 physical damage and pull the target into Melee.
ast.target: 对近距离内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，造成1d8+4点物理伤害，并将目标拉入近战范围。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The bandits post a constant watch, mostly directed outside the camp. Entrance will require stealth (Finesse), deception (Presence), or special information (Knowledge).
ast.target: 匪徒们设置了持续的警戒，主要针对营地外部。进入需要潜行（灵巧）、欺骗（魅力）或特殊情报（知识）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to have a pack of 1d4+2 hungry Strixwolves infiltrate the hideout, desperate for food.
ast.target: 让一包1d4+2只饥饿的尖啸狼潜入藏身处，它们正不顾一切地寻找食物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: On a failure or success with fear, some of the bandits grow suspicious and more actively patrol. Attempts to pass through the hideout using stealth have disadvantage for the rest of the scene or until the actively patrolling bandits are defeated or distracted by something else.
ast.target: 失败或带有恐惧的成功时，一些匪徒会起疑心并更积极地巡逻。在本场景剩余时间内，或直到积极巡逻的匪徒被击败或被其他事物分散注意力之前，使用潜行穿过藏身处的尝试处于劣势。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Navigating to a particular location in the tunnels requires a Progress Countdown (4 for most known settlements, 6 for less well-known or more-remote destinations). Potential Challenges include identical passageways, damaged stairwells leading to a lower level, root blockage, flooded tunnel.
ast.target: 在隧道中导航至特定地点需要一个进度倒计时（对于大多数已知定居点为4，对于不太知名或更偏远的目的地为6）。潜在的挑战包括相同的通道、通往更低层的损坏楼梯、树根堵塞、隧道淹水。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reveal that the path ahead has been blocked by the shifting of a great Sablewood tree. The party can dig around the root (Finesse), try to cut through it (Strength), or double back to find another path (Instinct).
ast.target: 揭示前方道路被一棵巨大的黑檀木树的移动所阻挡。队伍可以挖掘树根（灵巧）、尝试砍断它（力量），或折返寻找另一条路（本能）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to introduce a number of Jagged Knife Lackeys equal to the size of the party plus two Jagged Knife Bandits and a Jagged Knife Lieutenant seeking a 'toll' of two handfuls of gold per character for passing through their "protected territory".
ast.target: 引入数量等于队伍规模的锯齿刀帮凶，外加两名锯齿刀匪徒和一名锯齿刀副官，他们要求每个角色支付两把金币作为通过他们“受保护领地”的“通行费”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any overnight visitor is taken in by a family and given shelter for three nights. During this time, the guest's needs have priority and they can use anything that belongs to their hosts. After three nights, the visitors must trade families or leave the town.
ast.target: 任何过夜的访客都会被一个家庭收留，并获得三晚的庇护。在此期间，客人的需求优先，他们可以使用属于主人的任何东西。三晚之后，访客必须更换家庭或离开城镇。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A prominent member of the community approaches the PCs asking for help with unique preparations for the arrival of the town's leaders, the Faceless Six.
ast.target: 社区的一位杰出成员接近角色们，请求帮助为城镇领袖——无面六人——的到来做独特的准备。

ast.name: text
ast.source: when someone abuses guest privileges to summon twelve Young Dryads. They kidnap the culprit and drag them off to face the justice of the Sablewoods.
ast.target: 当有人滥用访客特权召唤十二只年轻的树精时。她们绑架肇事者，并将其拖走以接受黑檀木林的审判。

ast.name: text
ast.source: to summon two additional Ancient Skeletons from the ground within Very Close range of a PC.
ast.target: 从一名角色极近距离内的地面召唤两只额外的远古骷髅。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a JSON file to import adversaries and environments. This will merge with your existing data.
ast.target: 选择一个JSON文件以导入对手和环境。这将与您现有的数据合并。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to delete the data.json file?

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will permanently remove ALL stored adversaries and environments.
ast.target: 这将永久移除所有已存储的对手和环境。
